summary.event_scope: acts.Overgrowth.events + acts.Underdocks.events + acts.Hive.events + acts.Glory.events + shared_events from sts2_extracted_data_v4(new).json
summary.manual_review_note: DOLL_ROOM/TRIAL/WELCOME_TO_WONGOS are intentionally kept as dynamic transitions; no further text review is required.

description.zhs:
费力地穿过一片厚密的灌木丛并来到空地后，一种莫名的怀旧感突然向你袭来。

那是[purple]花朵的芬芳[/purple]、[green]腐烂的恶臭[/green]以及[orange]某种无法言说的气息[/orange]的混合体。每前进一步，这股气味都变得愈发浓烈。与此同时，你感受到周围的世界正开始[sine]扭曲，旋转[/sine]。

一股[sine][rainbow]变幻莫测的混沌[/rainbow][/sine]将你淹没，你开始慢慢地丧失了对自我的感知。
description.eng:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.

A mix of [purple]floral scents[/purple], [green]putrid decay[/green], and [orange]something else entirely[/orange]. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is [sine]warping and twisting[/sine].

Overcome with a sense of [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]shifting chaos[/rainbow][/sine], you begin to lose your sense of self.

description.zhs: [gold]变化[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。
description.eng: [gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: [gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。
description.eng: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs:
你选择了屈服，任由你的思绪[sine][purple]渐行渐远…[/purple][/sine]
你看见了自己正[blue]与朋友们谈笑风生[/blue]，[green]作为团队的一员并肩作战[/green]，[gold]与强敌生死对决[/gold]。这是梦境？还是现实？又或是两者皆有？无数双眼睛正注视着你和你的梦。它们…是谁…？

不知过了多久，你悠悠转醒。
香气转淡，随着你的意识重归清明，其影响也渐渐消散。当神志彻底稳定时，你感觉头脑从未有如此清醒过。

[sine][red]那些眼睛…究竟是什么？[/red][/sine]
description.eng:
You give in and your mind [sine][purple]drifts...[/purple][/sine]
You see yourself [blue]communing with friends[/blue], [green]fighting as a team[/green], and [gold]dueling great foes[/gold]. Is this a dream? Reality? Somehow both? Many sets of eyes perceive you and your dreams. Who are they...?

You awaken after an unknown amount of time.
The aroma weakens and its effects fade as you regain clarity. Upon restabilizing, you're more clearheaded than ever.

[sine][red]What were those eyes?[/red][/sine]

description.zhs:
你看见一只巨大的[jitter][red]蹒跚巨兽[/red][/jitter]正在驱赶一只受伤的[green][sine]绿色异鸟[/sine][/green]。

在那只异鸟逃离的隐蔽角落里，一颗[gold]无人看守的蛋[/gold]被遗弃在了那里。

[sine]你的肚子咕咕作响…[/sine]
description.eng:
You spot an enormous [jitter][red]Shambling Beast[/red][/jitter] chase off an injured [green][sine]Green Byrd[/sine][/green].

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned.

[sine]Your stomach gurgles...[/sine]

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]点最大生命值。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP.

description.zhs: 将一张[gold]{Card}[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [gold]{Card}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs:
你敲开了蛋壳，将其大口吞下。
真是顿不错的早餐。
description.eng:
You crack the egg open and gobble it up.
Good breakfast.

description.zhs: 你小心翼翼地捧起这颗蛋并将其收好，心想着它之后或许能[green]孵化[/green]成什么有用的东西。
description.eng: You gently scoop up the egg and stow it, thinking it may [green]hatch[/green] into something useful later.

description.zhs:
你在错路上走了一段时间之后，你发现自己置身于一片由[green]蕨类[/green]、[green]灌木[/green]和[green]藤蔓[/green]构成的茂密丛林中。尤其是[green]藤蔓[/green]。精疲力竭的感觉油然而生，一个可怕的念头随之浮现在脑海里：

[sine][purple]“你迷路了，毫无防备，而死亡的阴影正悄然逼近。”[/purple][/sine]

你要怎么办呢？
description.eng:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?

description.zhs: 回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。[red]进入战斗[/red]。
description.eng: Heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP. Fight some [red]enemies[/red].

transition_note.eng: Heals as at a rest site, then moves to the REST page with a fight option.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]金币[/gold]。失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, gains gold, then shows the TRUDGE_ON finish text.

description.zhs:
你精疲力竭，小歇了片刻…

…不料却被[gold][jitter]在你身上蠕动的什么东西[/jitter][/gold]惊醒了！
description.eng:
You're dead tired and take a nap...

...only to be awoken by [gold][jitter]something wriggling around[/jitter][/gold] on top of you!

transition_note.eng: Starts DenseVegetationEventEncounter combat and does not resume the event afterward.

description.zhs:
你一路劈砍，在丛林中硬生生砍出一条路来，但它似乎永无止境…

你靠着[green]怪异的果实[/green]和[orange]嘎嘣脆的虫子[/orange]勉强维生，喝着[aqua]发光植物[/aqua]的花蜜，你开始觉得你自己有点[jitter][red]疑神疑鬼的…[/red][/jitter]

不过，随后你发现了一片空地、一条小径，地上还有一些[gold]金币[/gold]。在金币中，还有一些画得相当潦草的地图！
麻烦解决了。
description.eng:
You hack and slash your way through the jungle but it goes on and on...

You sustain yourself on [green]strange fruits[/green], [orange]crunchy bugs[/orange], and drink the nectar of [aqua]glowing plants[/aqua] but you start feeling [jitter][red]paranoid...[/red][/jitter]

But then you find a clearing, a trail, and some [gold]Gold[/gold] coins scattered on the ground. Amongst the coins are some crudely-drawn maps!
Problem solved.

description.zhs:
在一片林间空地上，你撞见了一群[green]寒碜的冒险者小队[/green]，他们正俯瞰着一座[purple]巨型迷宫[/purple]并指手画脚。

他们邀请你入伙，共同开启一场搜刮迷宫财富的[b]史诗级任务[/b]。身为老手，你心知肚明这迷宫里塞满了[red][jitter]致命陷阱[/jitter][/red]和[orange][sine]守卫[/sine][/orange]。

搭伙干活确实容易些，但那样你就得跟人平分战利品了。
description.eng:
In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{JoinForcesGold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{JoinForcesGold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{SoloGold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。失去[red]{SoloHp}[/red]点生命。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{SoloGold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Lose [red]{SoloHp}[/red] HP.

description.zhs:
每个人的脸上都乐开了花，包括{IsMultiplayer:你和你的朋友们|你自己}！

这群人里居然还有个吟游诗人！
你们迈着轻快的步伐走入迷宫，[aqua]乌贼巫师阿奎德[/aqua]手到擒来地解除了所有陷阱，你和一位[red]格拉索里安战士[/red]则轻轻松松地解决掉了那些[orange]手持狼牙棒的守卫[/orange]。

这是你这辈子最愉快的一次冒险，你也真的留下了[gold][sine]美好的回忆[/sine][/gold]。
description.eng:
Everyone's face immediately lights up, including {IsMultiplayer:yours and your friends'|your own}!

One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard!
You merrily waltz into the maze as [aqua]Aquid the squid wizard[/aqua] effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the [red]Grathorian fighter[/red] take out the [orange]spiky club-wielding guards[/orange] with ease.

This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly [gold][sine]Great Memories[/sine][/gold].

description.zhs:
你{IsMultiplayer:和你的朋友，|}带着几分厌烦，无视了他们那此刻紧蹙的眉头，径直走了过去。其中一人甚至还[jitter][purple]对着你挥了挥拳头[/purple][/jitter]。

迷宫里到处都透着恶意。你掉进过地刺陷阱，被带刺的巨型滚木迎头击中，还得一路上和那些[orange]挥舞着狼牙棒的暴躁生物[/orange]缠斗。

你简直受够了这些带刺的玩意，甚至开始考虑下次冒险是不是得向团队协作低头了。
description.eng:
Feeling misanthropic, you {IsMultiplayer:and your friends |}wordlessly walk past their now-frowning faces. One of them even [jitter][purple]shakes their fist[/purple][/jitter] at you.

The maze is not welcoming. You fall into a spike trap, you are struck by a massive log with spikes, and [orange]feisty creatures with spiky clubs[/orange] fight you along the entire journey.

You are sick of spikes, and consider teamwork for the next adventure.

description.zhs:
你撞入了一片沐浴在诡异蓝光下的林间空地。高耸的蘑菇随着生物荧光起伏脉动，菌盖肿胀而泛着光泽。当你靠近时，真菌们竟开始发出[sine][purple]凄美而婉转的旋律[/purple][/sine]，这旋律在你的胸腔内激荡。

你注意到，在那个体型最大的蘑菇肉质中嵌入了某种闪光的东西，正随着真菌之歌有节奏地[sine]跃动[/sine]。
description.eng:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit [sine][purple]haunting, melodic tones[/purple][/sine] that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, [sine]pulsing[/sine] in rhythm with the fungal song.

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获取一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

description.zhs: 需要[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Requires [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]移除[blue]2[/blue]张牌。将一张[red]孢子心灵[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Spore Mind[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 将金币置于绵软的地面。随着金币缓缓沉入，几根卷须温柔地将一件遗物推向地表，让你得以干干净净地将其取走。
description.eng: Placing gold upon the spongy ground. The coins slowly sink as tendrils gently push the relic to the surface, allowing a clean retrieval.

description.zhs: 你直接将手探入那株主导蘑菇的绵软组织中，掏出了其中的遗物。真菌网络因你的侵入而战栗，你的意识也随之一并[sine]震颤[/sine]。
description.eng: You plunge your hand directly into the spongy tissue of the dominant mushroom to extract the relic within. The fungal network shudders at your intrusion, and your mind [sine]quivers[/sine] in response.

description.zhs:
你进入了一片[green]结晶树[/green]的林谷，树木开始[jitter]激动地颤抖起来[/jitter]！
一阵阵杂乱的[sine]问候与欢迎声[/sine]在你耳边不断响起，原来是一群[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]从树上[jitter]绽放[/jitter]了出来。

有一只[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]在角落里坐立不安的样子，显然不像其他同类那样善于社交。

你是去找一群变形灵，还是去找落单的那个？
description.eng:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

description.zhs: {IsMultiplayer:所有人|}失去[red]所有[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: {IsMultiplayer:Everyone loses|Lose} [red]ALL[/red] of {IsMultiplayer:their|your} [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

description.zhs: 获得[green]{MaxHp}[/green]点最大生命。
description.eng: Gain [green]{MaxHp}[/green] Max HP.

description.zhs:
你向那群叽叽喳喳的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]问好，它们伸出水晶手臂拥抱住了你。

它们将自己共有的知识分享给了你，更为你注入了[sine]拟形魔法[/sine]，改变了你的本质……这些[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]还真是群可爱的小生物啊。

[red]其中一个偷走了你的[/red][gold]金币[/gold][red]。[/red]
description.eng:
You greet the chittering [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with [sine]Morphic Magic[/sine], changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these [aqua]Morphics[/aqua].

[red]One of them stole your[/red] [gold]gold[/gold][red].[/red]

description.zhs:
你向那只孤单的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]伸出一只手，同情它内向的天性。
它送给了你一颗小小的水晶果实，你深知它们的传统，于是当场把果子吃了下去。

水晶果实让你的心智清明、使命感也更加坚定。你道了谢，再次向上方出发。
description.eng:
You reach out a hand to the lone [aqua]Morphic[/aqua], sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.

description.zhs:
你走路时差点踩上了一块发光的尖锐……种子？它的颜色非常明确地表明了这是一枚[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]！这些稀有种子不是应该已经灭绝了吗！？

传说里，只要吃下一粒这个种子，就能大幅[gold]强化你的体能[/gold]，但如果你把它种下然后好好养育它，又会怎么样呢？
description.eng:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua]! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly [gold]amplify your endurance[/gold], but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

description.zhs: 回复[green]{Heal}[/green]生命。[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。
description.eng: Heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]。
description.eng: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].

description.zhs:
你吃下了[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]，几乎一瞬间你就感觉到自己的[blue]四肢变得更加灵活[/blue]、[gold]眼中的色彩变得更加鲜艳[/gold]、而且你还能够[purple][sine]感知到附近敌人的灵魂[/sine][/purple]。

幸亏你没踩到它呢。
description.eng:
You ingest the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] and within moments your [blue]limbs feel more agile[/blue], [gold]colors sharpen[/gold], and you [purple][sine]sense the souls of nearby foes[/sine][/purple].

Good thing you didn't step on it.

description.zhs:
你在[green]密林[/green]一番寻觅，总算找到了一个[blue]通风良好[/blue]的花盆。然后你四处跋涉，寻找一个无人侵扰的地点，能让[orange]阳光从墙上的裂缝中倾泻下来[/orange]。你小心翼翼地用树皮和藤蔓将花盆加固，为它提供一些[green]迷彩遮掩[/green]，然后往里面放入了一些肥沃高营养的土壤，接着把[aqua]种子[/aqua]埋了进去。

最后，你从附近的植物上采集到了一些露水，洒在了土上。

[sine]小种子，快长大…[/sine]
你甚至没有察觉，[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]已经依附到了你的精神上。
感谢你的辛勤努力。
description.eng:
You scour the [green]Overgrowth[/green] and find a pot with [blue]good aeration[/blue]. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where [orange]light peeks through a cracked wall[/orange]. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to [green]camouflage[/green] it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the [aqua]seed[/aqua] just beneath the surface.

Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil.

[sine]Grow big, little seed...[/sine]
Unknowingly, the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] attaches to you spiritually.
Thankful of your hard work.

description.zhs:
你看见一尊古老的雕像，一半沉没在池塘的水中。雕像的手放在一把[blue]石剑[/blue]之上。

同时你还看见，池塘的水底似乎有一些东西在[gold][sine]闪烁[/sine][/gold]着光芒。
或许是人们祈愿投下的金币？

钱可是个好东西……
description.eng:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命.
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.

description.zhs: 获得[gold]{Relic}[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain the [gold]{Relic}.[/gold]

description.zhs:
你一个猛子扎进了水中！

在搜集[gold]祈愿金币[/gold]的时候，你听到上方传来[sine][blue]沉闷的回声[/blue][/sine]，然后你被一些石头给砸到了！

当你浮出水面时，才看见那尊古老的雕像已经因为你的所作所为而崩坏了——看来你不只是在[red]物理[/red]上、也是在[purple]灵性[/purple]上侵扰了这里。
description.eng:
You plunge deep into the water!

While collecting the [gold]offerings[/gold] you hear a [sine][blue]dull echo[/blue][/sine] and you're struck by stones!

Once you surface, you see that the old statue had crumbled due to your disturbance; [red]physical[/red] and [purple]spiritual[/purple].

description.zhs:
你[jitter]用力[/jitter]从雕像的手中取下了[blue]石剑[/blue]，结果雕像整个崩坏了！

现在再潜水去找池底的那些[gold][jitter]闪亮的东西[/jitter][/gold]就有点太危险了……

你看了看[blue]剑[/blue]，感受到其中有着极为强大的[green]沉睡着的力量[/green]。
description.eng:
You [jitter]wrest[/jitter] the [blue]sword[/blue] out of the statue's hands and the whole thing crumbles apart!

It's too dangerous to pick up whatever was [gold][jitter]glittering[/jitter][/gold] at the bottom of the pond now...

Inspecting the [blue]sword[/blue], you sense an incredible [green]dormant power[/green] within.

description.zhs:
你打败了两只[blue]同族守护者[/blue]，进入了它们守护的藏宝库。

里面有一块[purple][sine]刻着熟悉铭文的石板[/sine][/purple]。你的直觉告诉你，上面的语言可以轻易解读……可是一旦开始解读，你就必须全神贯注。

石板上散发出一种令人安心的能量，你也可以就这样砸碎它，来获取其中的[green]治愈能量[/green]。
description.eng:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

description.zhs: 回复[green]{SmashHPGain}[/green]点生命。
description.eng: Heal [green]{SmashHPGain}[/green] HP.

description.zhs: 停止阅读文字，就这样离开。
description.eng: Stop reading the text and leave.

description.zhs:
当你开始解读石板时，你的脑海中响起了[blue]同族真言[/blue]。

“[gold]真理[/gold]即是一切……”
description.eng:
As you begin deciphering the tablet, the [blue]Kin's Mantra[/blue] speaks to you.

“The [gold]Truth[/gold] is everything...”

description.zhs: 失去[red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

description.zhs:
你一直读到现在，感觉有点头晕目眩！

[purple][sine]英雄可不该一直读书读这么久…[/sine][/purple]
description.eng:
You feel faint from all this reading!

[purple][sine]Heroes weren't meant to read for such an extended period of time...[/sine][/purple]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

description.zhs:
[sine][red]你只能勉强坚持住阅读…[/red][/sine]
石板已经快要被解读完毕了。[blue]真言[/blue]之中，自有真理……

[jitter]真理！！真理究竟是什么！？[/jitter]
description.eng:
[sine][red]You're barely holding on...[/red][/sine]
The tablet is nearly deciphered. The [blue]Mantra[/blue] holds the truth... 

[jitter]THE TRUTH!! WHAT IS THE TRUTH!?[/jitter]

label.zhs: 继 续 解 读

description.zhs: 失去[red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

description.zhs:
恍惚之中，你解读完剩余的文本，也抛却了自己的心智与肉体。[purple][sine]对[gold]真理[/gold]之道的追求是唯一重要的事情。[/sine][/purple]

真的是这样吗？还剩下最后一个词……
[jitter]读懂它的代价，将是一切。[/jitter]
description.eng:
In a trance, you decipher the remaining text, abandoning mind and body. [purple][sine]The spiritual pursuit of the [gold]Truth[/gold] is all that matters.[/sine][/purple]

Or does it? One final word remains...
[jitter]It will cost everything.[/jitter]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。[gold]升级[/gold]你的所有卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{DecipherMaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL of your cards.

description.zhs:
[red][jitter]你将自己的一切耗尽[/jitter][/red]，试图解读出[gold]最后的词语[/gold]，然后你失去了意识……
当你苏醒过来时，你发现地板上刻了一个词。

[b]“空气”[/b]
description.eng:
[red][jitter]Everything was spent[/jitter][/red] to decipher the [gold]Final Word[/gold] and you black out...
When you come to, you realize something is etched into the floor.

[b]“Air”[/b]

description.zhs: 你停止阅读和解读，你的身体恢复了正常，但你依旧无比好奇：[gold]真理[/gold]究竟是什么。
description.eng: You stop all this reading and deciphering. Your body normalizes, though you can't help but wonder what the [gold]Truth[/gold] was.

description.zhs:
石板被[jitter][red]砸成了碎片[/red][/jitter]，其中的能量渗入了你的身体。

[green]你觉得自己焕然一新！[/green]
description.eng:
The tablet is [jitter][red]smashed to pieces[/red][/jitter], energy expelled from the tablet seeps into your body.

[green]You feel refreshed![/green]

description.zhs:
你找到了一个隔绝的[gold]休息处[/gold]，于是点起[orange]篝火[/orange]打算休息。
结果只是打算而已。

篝火点起后，火光立即胀大起来，不是向上而是向着[sine]侧面[/sine]延伸向一片满是[purple]冒油树木[/purple]的林地。

要不要不管这个情况，就这么继续休息？
description.eng:
You find a secluded [gold]Rest Site[/gold] and start a [orange]fire[/orange] to get some rest.
Or so you thought.

Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but [sine]sideways[/sine] towards a grove of [purple]oil-seeping trees[/purple].

Should you try resting anyways?

description.zhs: 失去[red]{MaxHpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{MaxHpLoss}[/red] Max HP. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

description.zhs: [green]回复全部生命值。[/green]获得[red]睡眠不佳[/red]。
description.eng: [green]Heal to full HP.[/green] Receive [red]Poor Sleep[/red].

description.zhs:
这些树木[purple]显然有恶意[/purple]所以你决定把它们解决掉。
几天之后，你浑身满是[red]灰烬[/red]和[purple]油脂黏液[/purple]。

被杀死的树木中飞出了一大群小小的异鸟灵魂，它们将一个[gold]小盒子[/gold]扔到了你的脚边。
[green]“感谢你将我们从那些树木体内解放出来……[sine]叽叽叽[/sine]！”[/green]

你真的该多睡一会儿。
description.eng:
These trees are [purple]clearly malicious[/purple] so you decide to get rid of them.
Days later, you're covered in [red]ash[/red] and [purple]oily goop[/purple].

A massive flock of little byrd spirits rise from the slain trees and drop a [gold]small box[/gold] at your feet.
[green]“Thank you for freeing us from those trees... [sine]cheep cheep[/sine]!”[/green]

You should really sleep more.

description.zhs:
繁忙的冒险让你精疲力尽，所以尽管异象丛生，你还是决定倒头就睡。

[orange]火焰[/orange]整晚呼啸作响，让你辗转反侧。那些[purple]恶心树木[/purple]的漆黑黏液散发出了一股恶臭的味道。

你醒了，虽然恢复了体力，精神却没有变好。
description.eng:
All this adventuring has left you exhausted, and despite the oddities, you decide to sleep.

You toss and turn as the [orange]fire[/orange] roars and crackles through the night. The [purple]disgusting trees[/purple] give off a wretched scent from their pitch-black sap.

You wake up, recovered, but not replenished.

description.zhs:
你跟着一阵[jitter]低沉的轰鸣声[/jitter]找到了源头：居然是一处平静的泉水，让你心生向往。泉水[sine][aqua]绿如碧玉[/aqua][/sine]，你还能从中看见一些[sine][gold]发光的尘埃[/gold][/sine]。

看起来十分诱人，这不可能出什么差错的吧？
description.eng:
You trace a [jitter]low rumble[/jitter] to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an [sine][aqua]emerald green[/aqua][/sine] with clusters of [sine][gold]glowing motes[/gold][/sine].

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

description.zhs: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]1[/blue]张牌。将[blue]{BatheCurses}[/blue]张[red]愧疚[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Remove [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [blue]{BatheCurses}[/blue] [red]Guilty[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 获得[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机[gold]药水[/gold]。
description.eng: Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

description.zhs:
你从池水中出来时，有一股轻微的[red][sine]不安感[/sine][/red]。

不过意外的是，你的精神恢复得相当不错。
description.eng:
You emerge from the pool with a slight [red][sine]feeling of unease[/sine][/red].

However, you feel surprisingly refreshed.

description.zhs:
在[sine][aqua]如此美丽的池水[/aqua][/sine]中洗澡听起来有点可疑……你决定还是拿瓶子装点水就好。

这应该会派的上用场。
description.eng:
Bathing in the [sine][aqua]beautiful water[/aqua][/sine] seems suspicious... you decide to bottle some up instead.

This will come in handy.

description.zhs:
在通过一个[red]枯木林谷[/red]时，你遇见了一株孤单的白骨般的树。它的枝丫如同肋骨般向内弯曲，枝条上则挂着黏土般的球状物体。

真是棵[purple]瘆人的树[/purple]。它还在发出低语：

[sine][blue]…来做交易…..[/blue][/sine]
description.eng:
Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]瓶随机[gold]药水[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。选择一张牌[gold]变化[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].

description.zhs:
你将一些[gold]金币[/gold]撒在树的根部，有两个黏土容器一声不吭地掉落在了地上。

容器裂开，里面居然是[green]完好无损的药水[/green]。

你拿起药水，立即逃离。
description.eng:
You scatter some [gold]gold[/gold] at the base of the tree and two of the clay vessels drop to the floor soundlessly.

They break open, and contain [green]perfectly intact potions[/green] within.

You nab the potions and flee.

description.zhs:
[blue][sine]轻语声[/sine][/blue]敦促你给树[gold]金币[/gold]，但你抵抗住了它的意志，反而上前去给了树木一个大大的拥抱！

它立即[red][jitter]摇摆晃动[/jitter][/red]起来，用枝丫刮伤了你，但最终还是平静了下来。这次[green]拥抱树木的体验[/green]让你有了一些[gold]变化[/gold]。

[purple][sine]…来个拥抱…..？[/sine][/purple]
description.eng:
The [blue][sine]whispering[/sine][/blue] compels you to give it [gold]gold[/gold] but you resist and give the tree a big hug instead!

It [red][jitter]thrashes about[/jitter][/red], scratching you with its branches, but eventually calms down. The [green]tree-hugging experience[/green] [gold]transforms[/gold] you.

[purple][sine]...make hug.....?[/sine][/purple]

description.zhs:
你打开一个尘封的盒子，发现里面有一组3个相当精细的木雕：

一只鸟、一条蛇、还有……一个圆环？

附近有一个基座，上面的凹陷痕迹正与这些木雕底部的形状吻合。你要把哪个木雕放在基座上呢？
description.eng:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

description.zhs: 选择[blue]1[/blue]张初始牌[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{BirdCard}[/gold]。
description.eng: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{BirdCard}[/gold].

description.zhs: 给[blue]1[/blue]张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{SnakeEnchantment}[/purple]。
description.eng: [gold]Enchant[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] card with [purple]{SnakeEnchantment}[/purple].

description.zhs: 你没有任何牌可以添加附魔：[purple]蛇行[/purple]。
description.eng: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

description.zhs: 选择[blue]1[/blue]张初始牌[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{ToricCard}[/gold]。
description.eng: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]{ToricCard}[/gold].

description.zhs:
你将木雕鸟儿放在基座上，雕像的[b]眼睛亮了起来[/b]，你仿佛听见自己的脑中有个轻微的声音在回荡着。

[sine]…咔…. 咔咔——…[/sine]

基座打开，有奇怪的液体流了出来。
那自然，你全都喝了下去。
description.eng:
You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind.

[sine]...caw.... caw caaaawww...[/sine]

The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out.
Naturally, you drink it all.

description.zhs: 你将木雕小蛇放在基座上，雕像的[b]鳞甲亮了起来[/b]！你觉得有一点温暖、舒适和摇摇晃晃。
description.eng: You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.

description.zhs:
你将木雕圆环放在基座上，你的[b]肚子亮了起来[/b]，因为雕像变成了一块滚烫的油炸甜点。无尽的饥饿感突然席卷了你，你很快就把那个甜甜圈吃了下去。

你感觉自己变得更结实了，但也更慢了。
description.eng:
You place the torus carving on the pedestal and your STOMACH LIGHTS UP as the statue transforms into a piping hot fried confection. An insatiable hunger takes over and you quickly consume the donut.

You feel tougher, but slower.

description.zhs:
你发现了一间僻静的密室。

氤氲的雾气从沸腾的池水中升腾而起，池水的色泽正以一种催眠般的节奏变幻。天花板上垂挂着覆满藤壶的异形生长物，滴落的黏稠液体在触及水面的瞬间，一边发出嘶嘶声，一边如活物般扭动挣扎。空气粘滞沉重，充斥着[blue]盐[/blue]的味道和某种[green]不言而喻的活物的气息[/green]。

当你靠近那口最大的水池时，液面泛起了涟漪。水流翻腾得愈发狂乱，仿佛正期待着你的到来。
description.eng:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

description.zhs: 回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
description.eng: Heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.

description.zhs: 获得[green]{MaxHp}[/green]点最大生命值。受到[red]{Damage}[/red]点伤害。
description.eng: Gain [green]{MaxHp}[/green] Max HP. Take [red]{Damage}[/red] damage.

description.zhs: 你抵御了池水的诱惑，转而收集起池边凝结的晶盐。当你将盐粒涂抹在皮肤上时，池水开始愤怒地翻腾，躁动地翻涌起白沫。周遭的温度骤降，在那一瞬间，房间内所有能映照出人影的表面，都浮现出一个双目空洞、形同枯槁的你。那种异样的感觉挥之不去——你似乎错过了某种脱胎换骨的契机。
description.eng: You decline the temptation of the waters, instead gathering crystalline salts that have formed along the edges. As you apply them to your skin, the pools churn and froth agitatedly. The ambient temperature drops noticeably, and for a moment all reflective surfaces in the room show a version of you that seems hollow-eyed and diminished. You can't shake the feeling of having missed something transformative.

description.zhs: 获得[green]{MaxHp}[/green]点最大生命值。受到[red]{Damage}[/red]点伤害。
description.eng: Gain [green]{MaxHp}[/green] Max HP. Take [red]{Damage}[/red] damage.

description.zhs: [sine][red]再泡下去，你就死定了。[/red][/sine]
description.eng: [sine][red]If you bathe any longer you will die.[/red][/sine]

description.zhs: 你最终还是没能承受住这股灼热感，急忙从池中抽身而出。
description.eng: The heat finally gets to you, and you hop out of the bath.

description.zhs:
池水如烈焰般灼烧着你的每一寸肌肤，那竟是[blue][jitter]彻骨严寒[/jitter][/blue]与[red][jitter]沸腾炽热[/jitter][/red]的诡异交织。

在水面之下，好像有什么东西掠过了你的双腿——是某种触须？还是带有意志的暗流？然而，当剧痛渐渐平息，你感到身体变得…更加凝实，更具质感。同时池水此时似乎正发出一阵满意的低鸣。
description.eng:
The liquid burns against your skin, simultaneously [blue][jitter]freezing[/jitter][/blue] and [red][jitter]scalding[/jitter][/red].

Beneath the surface, something brushes against your legs—tendrils? Currents with purpose? But when the pain subsides, you feel... denser somehow. More substantial. The waters seem to hum with satisfaction.

description.zhs:
[jitter]温度仍在疯狂攀升！[/jitter]

在这股蒸汽将你由内而外彻底蒸熟之前，你还能支撑多久？
description.eng:
[jitter]The temperature keeps rising![/jitter]

How long can you endure before the steam cooks you from within?

description.zhs:
[jitter][orange]祂的温度仍在飙升！[/orange][/jitter]

池子的咕嘟声，此刻听来竟像是某种狞笑。
description.eng:
[jitter][orange]It keeps getting hotter![/orange][/jitter]

The pool's bubbling sounds like laughter.

description.zhs:
[b][jitter][red]好烫！！！[/red][/jitter][/b]

你开始好奇这是否就是生活在恶魔之村里的感觉？
description.eng:
[jitter][red]IT'S SO HOT![/red][/jitter]

You wonder if this is what it's like to live in the Village of Demons?

description.zhs: [sine][purple]你浸泡了太久，已经忘却了时间的流逝，意识也开始模糊…[/purple][/sine]
description.eng: [sine][purple]You have bathed so long you have lost track of time and your mind...[/purple][/sine]

description.zhs: 这里很好。
description.eng: It's nice in here.

description.zhs: 真的很棒。
description.eng: Really fantastic.

description.zhs: 你感到舒适
description.eng: You feel great

description.zhs: [sine]唔…[/sine]
description.eng: [sine]Mmm...[/sine]

description.zhs:
[sine]呼...
...呼噜...[/sine]
description.eng:
[sine]Zzz...
..zzzz....[/sine]

description.zhs:
穿过一片由岩石与静水构成的梦幻之境，你来到了一座散发着[purple]逆流光[/purple]的[sine]沉没灯塔[/sine]前。

你可以把积聚在此的[aqua][sine]诡异发光水[/sine][/aqua]装进瓶子里，或者爬上这座破败的建筑，取下其中的[gold]透镜[/gold]。
description.eng:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a [sine]sinking lighthouse[/sine] emitting [purple]anti-light[/purple].

You can bottle up the [aqua][sine]eerily-glowing water[/sine][/aqua] that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the [gold]lens[/gold].

description.zhs: 获得一瓶[aqua]{Potion}[/aqua]。
description.eng: Procure [aqua]{Potion}[/aqua].

description.zhs: 获得[gold]{Relic}[/gold]。失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点最大生命。
description.eng: Obtain [gold]{Relic}[/gold]. Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] Max HP.

description.zhs:
你顺手拿了个瓶子，一边淡定地舀起了那些[aqua]发光液体[/aqua]，一边看着灯塔安详地沉入了泥沼。

还好你没往里去。
description.eng:
Using a nearby bottle, you calmly scoop up the [aqua]glowing liquid[/aqua] as the lighthouse peacefully sinks into the mud.

Good thing you weren't in there.

description.zhs:
你爬向灯塔顶端，看着它一直稳步下沉，心里直害怕。

进入到[gold]灯具室[/gold]后，你开始着手撬那块透镜，但与此同时那些[purple]逆流光[/purple]正开始[jitter][red]榨取你的生命[/red][/jitter]！

最后，你总算把它拧了下来；灯塔也停止了下沉。
description.eng:
You climb to the top of the lighthouse, unnerved by its steady sinking.

Upon reaching the [gold]lanthorn room[/gold], you start prying off the lens as the [purple]anti-light[/purple] [jitter][red]saps your vitality[/red][/jitter]!

Finally, you wring it free; the lighthouse stops sinking.

description.zhs:
你走进一间挂着歪斜招牌的小木屋，招牌亮得发晃，上面写着：
[aqua][b]“无尽盛宴—按饿付费！”[/b][/aqua]

屋里，一位[orange]身形修长的多臂大厨[/orange]正熟练地准备着[green]一份份小食[/green]，并将它们摆在一条[sine]蜿蜒的几丁质传送带[/sine]上。

大厨其中的一只手臂指向一块牌子：
每份[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]
description.eng:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

description.zhs: 从[gold]牌组[/gold]中随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Randomly upgrades an upgradable card and finishes with OBSERVE_CHEF text.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份鱼子酱

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获得[green]{CaviarMaxHp}[/green]点最大生命。接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]{CaviarMaxHp}[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Gains Max HP, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份蚌肉卷
label.eng: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。回复[green]{ClamRollHeal}[/green]点生命值。接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Heal [green]{ClamRollHeal}[/green] HP. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Heals HP, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份炸鳗鱼
label.eng: Grab Fried Eel off the Belt

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。将一张随机无色牌添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Adds a random colorless card, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份金色异鱼
label.eng: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt

description.zhs: [green]幸运头奖！[/green]获得[blue]{GoldenFyshGold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: [green]LUCKY WINNER![/green] Gain [blue]{GoldenFyshGold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Gains gold without paying the dish cost, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份果冻肝
label.eng: Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold]一张牌。接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Transform[/gold] a card. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Opens transform card selection, transforms 1 card, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

description.zhs: 你还能吃得下更多，但是兜里没[gold]金币[/gold]了。
description.eng: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Disabled option shown when gold is insufficient; no handler and no page change.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份海洋混混沙拉
label.eng: Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。将一张[gold]疯狂进食[/gold]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。 接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Adds FeedingFrenzy, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份香辣薄脆
label.eng: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。 随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Randomly upgrades an upgradable card, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

label.zhs: 从传送带上拿份可疑调味料
label.eng: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。随机获得一瓶[gold]药水[/gold]。接着吃！
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!

transition_note.eng: Offers a random potion reward, rolls the next dish, then moves to the conveyor result page.

description.zhs:
你从传送带上拿了盘[gold]{LastDishTitle}[/gold]转眼间就吃完了。
[green]好吃！[/green]
description.eng:
You grab the [gold]{LastDishTitle}[/gold] from the belt and scarf it down.
[green]Tasty![/green]

transition_note.eng: Leaves and shows the LEAVE finish text.

description.zhs: 既然已经吃饱喝足了，那就继续上路吧。
description.eng: Now that you've had your fill, you continue on your way.

description.zhs:
你没去座位上，而是躲在店门口的阴影中观察。

[orange]主厨[/orange]面不改色，手里的活儿一点没停。通过观察这份从容与专注，你学会了如何在战斗中摒除多余的动作和情绪波动。
description.eng:
Keeping your distance from a seat, you loiter in the shadows of the establishment's entrance.

[orange]The chef[/orange], unfazed, continues working. Studying this behavior and discipline, you seek to minimize unnecessary movement and emotion during combat.

description.zhs:
两个[gold]拳击构装体[/gold]正在挥拳互殴，而你看到在它们两个之间有一些财宝……

要不要把财宝顺走？
description.eng:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

description.zhs: 和它们战斗以得到[gold]更好的奖励[/gold]。
description.eng: Fight them for [gold]Greater Rewards[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Moves to I_CAN_TAKE_THEM, then presents only the fight option.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]受伤[/red]加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Adds Injury and offers a relic reward, then shows the NAB finish text.

description.zhs:
两个[gold]构装体[/gold]恶狠狠地转向了你！

你举起了自己的拳头。
description.eng:
The [gold]Constructs[/gold] turn to you menacingly!

You put your dukes up.

transition_note.eng: Starts PunchOffEventEncounter combat with relic and potion rewards for each player; the event does not resume afterward.

description.zhs:
你成功地偷偷顺走了遗物！

……可惜美中不足，一记右勾拳[jitter][red]狠狠地打在了你的脸上[/red][/jitter]。
description.eng:
You successfully nab the relic!

...or so you thought. A right-hook [jitter][red]clocks you in the face[/red][/jitter].

description.zhs:
你偶遇了一个[aqua][sine]巨大的螺旋漩涡[/sine][/aqua]。水流以精准而优雅的韵律回旋着，四周的墙壁也布满了螺旋纹路。

[purple][sine]转啊，转啊…转…
…转个不停…何等奇景…[/sine][/purple]

你要做什么呢？？
description.eng:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

description.zhs: 回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
description.eng: Heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.

description.zhs: 为一张基础“[gold]打击[/gold]”或“[gold]防御[/gold]”[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]涡旋[/purple]。
description.eng: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Basic [gold]Strike[/gold] or [gold]Defend[/gold] with [purple]Spiral[/purple].

description.zhs: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。 Add [red]Writhe[/red]到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs:
你捧起双手，浸入[sine][aqua]螺旋漩涡[/aqua][/sine]。

泉水徐徐注满掌心，你闭上双眼，小口啜饮。

甘甜的水化作[sine]涡旋[/sine]流经全身，直抵你的[gold]核心[/gold]，涤荡了杂念与痛楚…
description.eng:
You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...

description.zhs:
[sine][purple]…啊~ 如此美丽…
它在旋转…不停地旋转。是啊……
噢！刚才那是…一点小水花吗…？
…这也正常。你也要寻点乐子，对吧，[aqua]涡旋先生[/aqua]…哈哈…
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

是时候离开了。
你低声呢喃，转身离去。

[gold]“谢谢你，涡旋。”[/gold]
description.eng:
[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]“Thank you, Spiral.”[/gold]

description.zhs:
你愚蠢地将手臂探入[aqua][sine]螺旋漩涡[/sine][/aqua]的中心，打破了这里的平衡。
泉水瞬间变得[blue][jitter]冰冷刺骨[/jitter][/blue]并将你死死攫住，在你手臂上凿刻出[jitter][red]无形涡旋[/red][/jitter]。
指尖触碰到了某种硬物，你在剧痛中一阵摸索，总算从中拽出了一件[gold]遗物[/gold]！
description.eng:
Foolishly, you plunge your arm into the center of the [aqua][sine]Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua], disrupting the equilibrium. The water becomes [blue][jitter]frigid[/jitter][/blue] and grasps you, carving [jitter][red]Invisible Spirals[/red][/jitter] into your arm.

Your fingers brush against something solid, and you grasp around in pain to finally wrestle a [gold]Relic[/gold] out of there!

description.zhs:
一条小路让你找到了一个部分淹水的金库。
你看到里面有[blue]2[/blue]个[gold]箱子[/gold]，但却只有[blue]1[/blue]把[jitter][purple]脆弱的钥匙[/purple][/jitter]。

[gold]第一个箱子：[/gold]你摇晃了一下，能听到叮铃哐啷的轻响，应该是少量金币。
[gold]第二个箱子：[/gold]巨大、精致、而且显然[red]被诅咒了[/red]。里面有很多金币！
description.eng:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are [blue]2[/blue] [gold]chests[/gold] but only [blue]1[/blue] [jitter][purple]brittle key[/purple][/jitter].

[gold]The First Chest:[/gold] Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{SmallChestGold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{SmallChestGold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{LargeChestGold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。得到[red]贪婪[/red]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{LargeChestGold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Receive [red]Greed[/red].

description.zhs: 没错，里面果然有[gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Yup, there was [gold]gold[/gold] in it.

description.zhs:
你从没有在同一个地方见到过这么多[gold]金币[/gold]！

[sine]恐怕[/sine][blue]商人[/blue][sine]的所有商品都能被买下来…[/sine]
{Monologue}
[sine]危险的歹徒也可以用钱收买消灾…[/sine]

这些[red][sine]无比贪婪[/sine][/red]的念头，会永远萦绕在你脑中……
description.eng:
You've never seen so much [gold]gold[/gold] in one place!

[sine]All of the [/sine][blue]Merchant's[/blue][sine] wares can be bought...[/sine]
{Monologue}
[sine]Dangerous thugs can be paid off...[/sine]

The [red][sine]feverishly greedy[/sine][/red] thoughts stay with you forever...

description.zhs:
一道门扉突然凭空出现了…

你步入其中，见到了两道散发着微光的门，以及一位[gold]衣着得体的看门人[/gold]。
“终于有访客了！请，请！选一扇门，任何一扇都可以！”

[blue]我们还在尖塔里吗？这地方为何竟如此洁净？[/blue]
description.eng:
A doorway existed where none existed moments before...

You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a [gold]well-dressed doorman[/gold].
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”

[blue]Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?[/blue]

description.zhs: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择[blue]1[/blue]张牌移除。
description.eng: Remove [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random cards.

description.zhs:
[sine][purple]步入黑暗之中…[/purple][/sine]

所见之处空无一物。
但这反而帮你集中了思绪…你摒弃了那些[red]多余的杂念[/red]。

你回到了[blue]暗港[/blue]。
怎么个事儿? 哈…?
description.eng:
[sine][purple]Into the darkness...[/purple][/sine]

You see nothing.
But this helps you think... You shed [red]pointless thoughts[/red].

You're back in the [blue]Underdocks[/blue].
How did you? Huh...?

description.zhs:
[sine][purple]步入光明之中…[/purple][/sine]

[jitter]好刺眼的光！！[/jitter]但这股光流转而[gold]强化[/gold]了你。

你回到了[blue]暗港[/blue]。
怎么个事儿? 哈…?
description.eng:
[sine][gold]Into the light...[/gold][/sine]

[jitter]It's blinding!![/jitter] But the light [gold]strengthens[/gold] you.

You're back in the [blue]Underdocks[/blue].
How did you? Huh...?

description.zhs:
你发现了一座如山般堆积的垃圾，里面有着[red][jitter]废旧武器[/jitter][/red]、[orange]遗弃饰品[/orange]和众多[purple][sine]其他古怪玩意儿[/sine][/purple]。垃圾堆摇摆晃动着，仿佛正在从内部不断生长变大……

如果你从表面搜索，应该能找到一些好东西。但如果你努努力扎进垃圾堆里面，那就能找到一些[gold]奇珍异宝[/gold]。
description.eng:
You discover a towering pile of [red][jitter]scrapped weapons[/jitter][/red], [orange]discarded trinkets[/orange], and [purple][sine]other oddities[/sine][/purple]. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...

If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some [gold]exotic treasures[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。获得一件被遗忘的旧日[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. Obtain a random forgotten [gold]Relic[/gold] from the past.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。获得一张被遗忘的旧日卡牌。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.

description.zhs:
你花了不少时间在[red][sine]危险的垃圾[/sine][/red]中努力翻找，最终找到了一件[gold]旧日遗物[/gold]！

为什么这样的东西会被扔掉呢？
description.eng:
You spend a decent amount of time wading through the [red][sine]dangerous garbage[/sine][/red] and find a [gold]relic of the past[/gold]!

Why was this thrown out?

description.zhs:
你从安全的距离绕着垃圾堆走着，四处拾取了一些[gold]被遗忘的值钱物品[/gold]与[purple][sine]奇怪东西[/sine][/purple]。

这些东西最初是为什么被创造出来的呢？
description.eng:
You walk around the pile from a safe distance and pick up some [gold]forgotten valuables[/gold] and [purple][sine]oddities[/sine][/purple] here and there.

Why were these created in the first place?

description.zhs:
在昏暗的通道中前行时，你找到了一个小店，里面有一个[aqua]憔悴的员工[/aqua]。四周的书架上[sine]塞满了[/sine]无数潮湿的卷轴与羊皮纸。

[aqua]抄写员兼店主[/aqua]注意到有客人进店，猛地回过神来，为你指了指书桌上摆放着的一些[gold]器具[/gold]。
description.eng:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.

description.zhs: 获得[green]6[/green]点最大生命。
description.eng: Gain [green]6[/green] Max HP.

description.zhs: 支付[red]{PricklySpongeGold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。给[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]稳定[/purple]。
description.eng: Pay [red]{PricklySpongeGold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} with [purple]Steady[/purple].

description.zhs: 需要[blue]{PricklySpongeGold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Requires [blue]{PricklySpongeGold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs: 支付[red]{Gold}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]稳定[/purple]。
description.eng: Pay [red]{Gold}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]Steady[/purple].

description.zhs: 需要[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Requires [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs:
[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]小心地拿起那个装着[red]亮红色墨水[/red]的小瓶，轻轻摇晃了一下，然后又用手做了个蘸取的动作。

你将你的手指往墨水上蘸了蘸，突然感觉到自己身体中传来[green][jitter]一阵活力的电流[/jitter][/green]！

[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]似乎对你的反应相当满意，礼貌地鞠了个躬，挥手向你告别。
description.eng:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] carefully picks up the vial filled with a [red]bright red ink[/red] and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion.

You dip your fingers into the ink and a [green][jitter]jolt of vitality[/jitter][/green] courses through you!

Pleased with your reaction, the [aqua]scribe[/aqua] gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.

description.zhs:
[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]拿起[gold]扎手海绵[/gold]（海绵还发出了一声吱吱声），把它往你的卷轴上抹去。

[jitter][blue]*吱吱 吱吱 吱吱*[/blue][/jitter]

扎手的纹理在卷轴上留下了[purple][sine]闪烁的印记[/sine][/purple]，似乎让墨水更加稳定了……
description.eng:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] grabs the [gold]prickly sponge[/gold] (it squeaks) and dabs it across your scrolls.

[jitter][blue]*squeak squeak squeak*[/blue][/jitter]

The prickly texture leaves behind [purple][sine]shimmering marks[/sine][/purple] that seem to stabilize the ink...

description.zhs:
[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]拿起[jitter][gold]扭动着的羽毛笔[/gold][/jitter]，熟练而迅速地在你的头上画下了一个奇怪的印记。

印记突然[purple][sine]大放光芒[/sine][/purple]，然后消失不见……
description.eng:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] lifts the [jitter][gold]wriggly quill[/gold][/jitter] and with swift, practiced movements, etches a strange mark unto your head.

The mark [purple][sine]glows bright[/sine][/purple], then vanishes...

description.zhs:
[b][jitter]铿！铿！！锵！！！[/jitter][/b]

墙壁的另一侧传来了阵阵金属交击声的回响…

当你把头贴在墙上准备探听一番时——墙壁轰然开启，露出了一个正在埋头苦干的[orange]魁梧六臂身影[/orange]。
它的“脸部”是一团由[gold][sine]发光符文构成的流转旋涡[/sine][/gold]，正在不断变幻交织。

“一个拥有[aqua]进阶之魂[/aqua]的人竟然找到了我的工坊？那就让我们开始[jitter]融合[/jitter]吧！”
description.eng:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a [orange]hulking six-armed figure[/orange] toiling away.
Its “face” is a [gold][sine]swirling vortex of glowing sigils[/sine][/gold] that shift about.

“One with an [aqua]Ascending Spirit[/aqua] has found my workshop? Let's get [jitter]COMBINING[/jitter]!”

description.zhs: 移除[blue]2[/blue]张[gold]防御[/gold]。并将一张[gold]{Card2}[/gold]添加至你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Remove [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Defends[/gold]. Add [gold]{Card2}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 移除[blue]2[/blue]张[gold]打击[/gold]。并将一张[gold]{Card1}[/gold]添加至你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Remove [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strikes[/gold]. Add [gold]{Card1}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs:
[b][jitter]锵！锵！！！[/jitter][/b]

[orange]熔合者[/orange]重重地锤击着它的骨砧。

关于战斗、守护与防御策略的回忆，在每一次敲击下都磨砺得愈发清晰。
你那最究极的技艺，已重现于你的心头。
description.eng:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

The [orange]Amalgamator[/orange] strikes its Bone Anvil.

Memories of combat, protecting, and defensive strategies sharpen with each blow.
Your most ultimate technique returns to you.

description.zhs:
[b][jitter]锵！锵！！！[/jitter][/b]

[orange]熔合者[/orange]重重地锤击着它的骨砧。

关于战斗、冲锋与进攻策略的回忆，在每一次敲击下都磨砺得愈发尖锐。
你那最究极的技艺，已重现于你的心头。
description.eng:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

The [orange]Amalgamator[/orange] strikes its Bone Anvil.

Memories of combat, attacking, and offensive strategies sharpen with each blow.
Your most ultimate technique returns to you.

description.zhs:
当你正奋力抵御一群[jitter][red]穷凶极恶的虫群[/red][/jitter]时，你突然注意到，一位[gold]威猛剽悍的战士[/gold]竟然一直就在你身边并肩作战！

虫群们，察觉败局，四散而逃。你转向这位战友。
“你想要一些消灭这些害虫的建议吗？”

还挺有礼貌。你点了点头，接受了他的提议。
description.eng:
As you're fending off a [jitter][red]swarm of aggressive insects[/red][/jitter] you suddenly notice a [gold]Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man[/gold] fighting beside you this whole time!

The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

description.zhs: 将一张[gold]{Card1}[/gold]添加至你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [gold]{Card1}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 将一张[gold]{Card2}[/gold]添加至你的[gold]牌组[/gold]
description.eng: Add [gold]{Card2}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 那人默默向你点头，然后转身离去。
description.eng: Silently the figure nods at you, and then walks away.

description.zhs:
“原来如此……你想学习[gold]杀灭的技巧[/gold]。很好…”

他短暂地停顿了一下，思考着如何将这一招传授给你…

[jitter][b]“这就是真传！看好了！！”[/b][/jitter]
他一边炫耀着，一边举起了一罐[green]杀虫剂[/green]。
description.eng:
“I see... you wish to learn the [gold]Extermination Technique[/gold]. Very good...”

He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver...

[jitter]“THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!”[/jitter]
He boasts while holding up a can of [green]Insecticide[/green].

description.zhs:
“原来如此…你想学习[gold]压扁技巧[/gold]。很好…”

他短暂地停顿了一下，思考着如何将这一招传授给你…

[jitter][b]“这就是真传！看好了！！”[/b][/jitter]
他一边炫耀着，一边一脚踩在了一只巨大的虫子身上。
description.eng:
“I see... you wish to learn the [gold]Squash Technique[/gold]. Very good...”

He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver...

[jitter]“THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!”[/jitter]
He boasts while stepping on a giant bug.

description.zhs:
在你面前的是一幕颇为宏伟的景象。
你看到三座不同颜色的石像耸立在高台之上，正就色彩的哲学内涵展开[jitter][red]激烈的争论[/red][/jitter]。

随着你的倾听，你感觉到眼下最核心的议题是，究竟哪种颜色才是[gold][b]最棒的[/b][/gold]。

你加入其中，表达了你的见解。
description.eng:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a [jitter][red]heated debate[/red][/jitter] over the philosophical implications of color.

As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is [gold]THE BEST[/gold].

You chime in with your thoughts.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张故障机器人的卡牌。
description.eng: Obtain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Defect {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this character pool offers three card rewards, then finishes on DONE. Visible options are randomly reduced to at most 3 unlocked non-current character pools.

description.zhs: 获得[gold]棱镜碎片[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain [gold]Prismatic Shard[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Choosing this character pool offers three card rewards, then finishes on DONE. Visible options are randomly reduced to at most 3 unlocked non-current character pools.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张铁甲战士的卡牌。
description.eng: Obtain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ironclad {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this character pool offers three card rewards, then finishes on DONE. Visible options are randomly reduced to at most 3 unlocked non-current character pools.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张亡灵契约师的卡牌。
description.eng: Obtain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Necrobinder {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this character pool offers three card rewards, then finishes on DONE. Visible options are randomly reduced to at most 3 unlocked non-current character pools.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张储君的卡牌。
description.eng: Obtain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Regent {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this character pool offers three card rewards, then finishes on DONE. Visible options are randomly reduced to at most 3 unlocked non-current character pools.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张静默猎手的卡牌。
description.eng: Obtain [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Silent {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this character pool offers three card rewards, then finishes on DONE. Visible options are randomly reduced to at most 3 unlocked non-current character pools.

description.zhs: 你的见解似乎并不怎么受欢迎，石像们再次陷入了那场无休止的辩论之中。
description.eng: Your opinion doesn't seem welcome, and the statues resume their unending debate.

description.zhs:
一朵[green]巨型花卉[/green]正生长在一座[red][jitter]骸骨堆积而成的山[/jitter][/red]上。

随着它那[sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]变换色彩的花瓣[/rainbow][/sine]不断搏动，你感觉到中心处一定有[aqua]一团强力花粉[/aqua]，但那起伏的花瓣[red]如刀锋般锋利[/red]且捉摸不定。

你本可以只采集一些[gold]金色花蜜[/gold]，但中心处的那个奖赏实在是太诱人了…
description.eng:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Prize1}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Prize1}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Gains the current first-tier gold prize and finishes the event.

description.zhs: 深入。失去[red]5[/red]点生命值
description.eng: Enter deeper. Lose [red]5[/red] HP.

transition_note.eng: Takes damage and advances to the REACH_DEEPER_1 page.

description.zhs:
你小心翼翼地从花卉的血肉中采集了一些[gold]花蜜[/gold]。
花瓣愤怒地闪烁着。
description.eng:
You carefully gather some [gold]nectar[/gold] from the flower's flesh.
The petals shimmer angrily.

description.zhs:
在[purple]毒素[/purple]、[red]倒刺[/red]和[green]叶片[/green]的百般折磨下，你全身麻木，状态奇差无比。
收手吧。

你收起了一团[gold]上等花蜜[/gold]并撤退了。
description.eng:
Your whole body is numb and messed up from the [purple]toxins[/purple], [red]barbs[/red], and [green]leaves[/green].
Enough is enough.

You stow away a glob of [gold]high-quality nectar[/gold] and retreat.

description.zhs:
你纵身一跃，一把抓住了[aqua]花粉核心[/aqua]！
这株植物剧烈地颤抖起来；它的花瓣变得暗淡无光，那阵[jitter]酥麻感[/jitter]也随之消散。

原本的[gold]金色花蜜[/gold]变成了毫无价值的烂泥。
你，杀死了它。
description.eng:
With a final lunge you grab hold of the [aqua]pollinous core[/aqua]!
The plant shudders violently; its petals go dull, and the [jitter]tingling[/jitter] stops.

The [gold]golden nectar[/gold] becomes worthless muck.
You killed it.

description.zhs:
你拨开了一层[red]锋利如刃的[/red]花瓣。它们表面覆盖着一层能让你的皮肤产生[jitter]酥麻感[/jitter]的[purple]物质[/purple]。这似乎能麻痹疼痛？

或许这就是这里为什么会有一堆骸骨…
description.eng:
You push past a layer of [red]razor-sharp[/red] petals, they're coated with a [purple]substance[/purple] that makes your skin [jitter]tingle[/jitter]. This seems to numb the pain?

Maybe this is why there is a pile of bones here...

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Prize2}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Prize2}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Gains the current second-tier gold prize and finishes the event.

description.zhs: 再深入一点。失去[red]6[/red]点生命值。
description.eng: Enter even deeper. Lose [red]6[/red] HP.

transition_note.eng: Takes damage and advances to the REACH_DEEPER_2 page.

description.zhs:
随着你继续深入，那种酥麻感变成了一阵[jitter][red]阵阵袭来的虚弱感[/red][/jitter]…

[purple]这朵花想吃了我。那我为什么要钻进来？[/purple]
description.eng:
The tingling turns into a [jitter][red]throbbing weakness[/red][/jitter] as you push onwards...

[purple]This flower wants to eat me. Why did I go into it?[/purple]

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Prize3}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Prize3}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Gains the third-tier gold prize and finishes the event.

description.zhs: 失去[red]7[/red]点生命值。 获得[gold]花粉核心[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]7[/red] HP. Obtain [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Takes damage, obtains PollinousCore, then finishes the event.

description.zhs:
眼前突然出现一大片土地，上面[jitter]凿刻着密密麻麻的人形轮廓[/jitter]，让你不由得停下了脚步。

其中有一个洞的轮廓，竟然和你的体型一模一样。

[sine][orange]完美契合…[/orange][/sine]
description.eng:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

description.zhs: 为一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]。
description.eng: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].

description.zhs: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。将一张[red]{ResistCurse}[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中。
description.eng: Remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]{ResistCurse}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs:
虽然有些紧，你还是硬把自己塞进了那个洞里……

你越往深处前进，周围就[sine][purple]变得越发黑暗[/purple][/sine]。
终于，你看到一丝[gold]微光[/gold]逐渐变亮，照亮了另一头的出口。

你走出来时形貌未变，但你已洞悉了[green]生命至极的秘密[/green]。
description.eng:
It's a snug fit, but you squeeze yourself into the hole...

The further you go, the [sine][purple]darker it becomes[/purple][/sine].
Eventually, you see a [gold]faint light[/gold] grow brighter and reveal the other side.

You step out unchanged, but now understand the [green]intimate secrets of life[/green].

description.zhs:
你无视了所有这些坑洞，甚至包括轮廓与你[orange]契合得完美无缺[/orange]的哪一个……

我为什么没进去？要是进去了，会发生什么？我过去是否曾经进入过那个洞？这些洞到底是谁挖的？

[sine][red]什么…谁…哪?[/red][/sine]
description.eng:
You walk past all the holes, even the one carved [orange]perfectly in your shape...[/orange]

Why didn't I go inside? What would have happened? Have I been in that hole before? Who made these holes?

[sine][red]What is... who... where?[/red][/sine]

description.zhs:
这间密室里堆满了[red]报废的机器人[/red]。

其中一台孤零零的自动机械，其[sine][aqua]核心仍在幽幽发光[/aqua][/sine]，但它已被一种诡异的有机增生组织吞没，毫无响应。
description.eng:
There's a chamber filled with [red]dead robots[/red].

A lone automaton still has a [sine][aqua]faintly glowing core[/aqua][/sine] but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

description.zhs: 随机获得一张[gold]能力牌[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain a random [gold]Power[/gold].

description.zhs: 随机获得一张[gold]耗能为0的牌[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain a random [gold]0 cost card[/gold].

description.zhs:
通过研究这台[aqua]发光的自动机械[/aqua]以及它的内部结构。你意识到，特定的金属排列可以抵抗各种疾苦！

你将这项[blue]技术[/blue]应用到了自己身上。
description.eng:
By studying the [aqua]Glowing Automaton[/aqua] and how its inner workings are laid out, you realize that specific metals and their arrangements resist various ailments!

You apply this [blue]Technology[/blue] to yourself.

description.zhs:
就在触碰[aqua]核心[/aqua]的刹那，你被一股[jitter][gold]电流[/gold]猛烈击中[/jitter]。

你仓皇退开，感觉在那次遭遇之后，自己身上似乎发生了某种[sine][purple]异变[/purple][/sine]。
description.eng:
At the slightest touch of the [aqua]core[/aqua], you are [jitter]jolted by [gold]electricity[/gold][/jitter].

You scamper away, feeling [sine][purple]altered[/purple][/sine] from the experience.

description.zhs:
远处有一幕古怪的景象。成堆的[sine][red]昆虫残骸[/red][/sine]层层堆叠，围绕着一个像是[orange]微小的光团[/orange]的东西。
它似乎对各种虫子都有着不俗的吸引力，但你却目睹了它迸发出火焰！

你走近前去一探究竟。
description.eng:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]{Curse}[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[gold]{Relic}[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [red]{Curse}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain the [gold]{Relic}[/gold].

description.zhs: 你的最大生命值太低了。
description.eng: Your Max HP is too low.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs:
你小心翼翼地靠近[orange]鬼火[/orange]…
你离得越近，它对你的反应就越强烈。

在伸手可及的地方，你紧握住了这团[orange]鬼火[/orange]，但它同时也[red][jitter]喷出一股炽热的蒸汽和火焰，将你灼伤！[/jitter][/red]

尽管如此，你还是在一番[jitter]手忙脚乱的缠斗[/jitter]中将其制服。最终，这团[orange]鬼火[/orange]选择了屈服，并认你为它的新主人。
description.eng:
You approach the [orange]Wisp[/orange] cautiously...
The closer you get, the more it reacts to your presence.

When in arm's reach, you grasp the [orange]Wisp[/orange] but it [red][jitter]scalds you with a blast of hot steam and flame![/jitter][/red]

Still, you [jitter]fumble and wrestle[/jitter] the creature into submission. Eventually, the [orange]Wisp[/orange] concedes and recognizes you as its new owner.

description.zhs:
你决定不去惊动那个小家伙。小心为上！

这附近没剩下多少东西，不过你在那些昆虫残骸中发现了一些散落的[gold]金币[/gold]。
你选择了就此收手。
description.eng:
You decide to leave the little one alone. Better play it safe!

Not much is in the area, but you find some [gold]gold[/gold] scattered amongst the dead bugs.
You don't seek an answer.

description.zhs:
在你上方，一个茧正在[jitter]颤动扭曲[/jitter]，似乎就要破茧而出了！

……它停止了扭动。[orange][sine]茧燃烧了起来[/sine][/orange]！[jitter]发生什么事了？[/jitter]
一道[gold]光芒[/gold]与[red]烈焰[/red]闪过，一个[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]向你冲来，试图要与你融为一体，以求完整。
description.eng:
Above, a cocoon is [jitter]shaking and wriggling[/jitter], about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. [orange][sine]The cocoon ignites[/sine][/orange]! [jitter]What is going on?[/jitter]
In a flash of [gold]light[/gold] and [red]flame[/red], a [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.

description.zhs: 回复[green]{LetItInHealAmount}[/green]点生命。将一张[gold]羽化[/gold]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Heal [green]{LetItInHealAmount}[/green] HP. Add [gold]Metamorphosis[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[red]{RejectionHpLoss}[/red]点生命。[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{RejectionHpLoss}[/red] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card.

description.zhs:
[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]与你合二为一。这只契合灵体带来的活力迅速[green]治愈[/green]了你。

你[blue]重获新生[/blue]。
description.eng:
The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] merges with you. The vital kindred spirit swiftly [green]heals[/green] you up.

You are [blue]reborn[/blue].

description.zhs:
[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]被你的意志轻松挡下。

然而渴求着宿主的它仍然反复向你冲撞过来。最终它用尽了力量，[purple][sine]噗的一声[/sine][/purple]消散了。

[sine]真是转瞬即逝的灵魂啊。[/sine]
description.eng:
The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] is easily stopped by your will.

However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a [purple][sine]poof[/sine][/purple].

[sine]A fleeting spirit.[/sine]

description.zhs:
你发现了一把发出微光的钥匙，于是将它捡了起来。

“我找这把钥匙可把这里翻了个遍！你要是不介意的话……”

这家伙看起来不是什么好人，但或许你也不该以貌取人。
description.eng:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.

description.zhs: 战斗来取得钥匙。
description.eng: Fight to obtain the Key.

transition_note.eng: Moves to KEEP_THE_KEY, then presents a fight option.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Returns the key and directly finishes the event with the DONE/RETURN_THE_KEY text.

description.zhs: 陌生人感谢了你的帮助，给了你许多奖赏。
description.eng: The stranger thanks you for your help, and rewards you handsomely.

transition_note.eng: Finish text entry after returning the key; no further page transition.

description.zhs: 陌生人恶狠狠地看着你，看起来今天你们之中只有一个人可以带着钥匙离开这里了。
description.eng: The stranger looks at you menacingly. It seems like only one of you is making it out of here with the key.

transition_note.eng: Starts MysteriousKnightEventEncounter combat; rewards include the LanternKey special card.

description.zhs:
你在行走时撞到了一张蜘蛛网，立即[jitter][red]慌了神[/red][/jitter]！
可是很快，一阵[sine][blue]平静的感觉[/blue][/sine]席卷了你……

[sine]“冷静下来，我需要你不再弄坏我的网。”[/sine]

你怎么会这么快就冷静下来的呢？
一只[orange]小之又小[/orange]的蜘蛛沿着丝线降落下来与你问好，它看起来愿意收取一些[gold]金币[/gold]来分享它的部分技术。
description.eng:
You walk through a spider web and [jitter][red]PANIC[/red][/jitter]!
But then, a [sine][blue]wave of calm[/blue][/sine] washes over you...

[sine]“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”[/sine]

How did you calm down so quickly?
An [orange]itsy bitsy[/orange] spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for [gold]gold[/gold].

description.zhs: 支付[red]{ArachnidAcupunctureCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]2[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: Pay [red]{ArachnidAcupunctureCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 支付[red]{BreathingTechniquesCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。将[blue]2[/blue]张[gold]开悟[/gold]加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Pay [red]{BreathingTechniquesCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Enlightenment[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 支付[red]{EmotionalAwarenessCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]1[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: Pay [red]{EmotionalAwarenessCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Remove [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: [gold]金币[/gold]不足。
description.eng: Not enough [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs:
[sine]“不要…移动…”[/sine]一只[orange]微型蜘蛛[/orange]轻声说着，它的两条前腿开始[aqua][jitter]发出微光[/jitter][/aqua]。

然后——是一阵[jitter]飞快戳刺的动作[/jitter]，把你全身扎了个遍！
你感觉全身轻若无物。这笔钱真是值得。
description.eng:
[sine]“Don't... move...”[/sine] mutters the [orange]miniature spider[/orange] as its forelegs begin to [aqua][jitter]glow[/jitter][/aqua].

Then— in a [jitter]rush of jabbing motions[/jitter], pierces you all over!
A sense of weightlessness comes over you. Well worth the money.

description.zhs:
[sine]“在脑海中想象你的气道始终开启…每一次呼吸都很有意义。”[/sine]

你用自己觉得合理的方法练习了这种技术。
description.eng:
[sine]“Visualize your airways staying open... Each breath is meaningful.”[/sine]

You practice the technique in a way that makes sense to you.

description.zhs:
[orange]小小的蜘蛛[/orange]开始跳起了[sine][purple]迷幻的舞步[/purple][/sine]，并不断吟唱着。

[sine]“思维不会影响现实。恐慌是思维的杀手。一切依照计划。”[/sine]

你觉得这些话很有道理，[orange]小小蜘蛛[/orange]竟有大大智慧。
description.eng:
The [orange]teeny-weeny spider[/orange] begins a [sine][purple]hypnotic dance[/purple][/sine] and repeatedly chants.

[sine]“Thoughts don't affect reality. Panic is the thought-killer. Follow the plan.”[/sine]

This makes sense to you. Big wise words from a [orange]tiny spider[/orange].

description.zhs:
当你靠近时，它突然开始轰鸣，滋滋作响，随后爆发出耀眼的光芒！

[b]“[jitter]滋滋！[/jitter] 训练时间到！！！你有[blue]3个回合[/blue]的时间来击败我！
选择一个档位，否则就准备好面对[red]致命的羞辱[/red]吧。[/b]
以下是可选方案：”

在发布完这段恐怖的宣言后，假人开始认真地读出详细的指令。

要选哪一个呢？
description.eng:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

“[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:”

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

description.zhs: 与一个[blue]{Setting1Hp}[/blue]点生命值的假人战斗。随机获取[blue]1[/blue]瓶[gold]药水[/gold]。
description.eng: Fight a [blue]{Setting1Hp}[/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Starts the Battleworn Dummy combat (Setting1). Resume shows VICTORY/DEFEAT after combat and grants the setting reward.

description.zhs: 与一个[blue]{Setting2Hp}[/blue]点生命值的假人战斗。随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: Fight a [blue]{Setting2Hp}[/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

transition_note.eng: Starts the Battleworn Dummy combat (Setting2). Resume shows VICTORY/DEFEAT after combat and grants the setting reward.

description.zhs: 与一个[blue]{Setting3Hp}[/blue]点生命值的假人战斗。获取一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Fight a [blue]{Setting3Hp}[/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Starts the Battleworn Dummy combat (Setting3). Resume shows VICTORY/DEFEAT after combat and grants the setting reward.

description.zhs:
[b]“[jitter][red]你真是太弱了！！[/red][/jitter]
羞辱已执行完毕！”[/b]

假人沉默了片刻后——

“下次请选择较低的档位。祝您今天过得愉快。”
description.eng:
“[jitter][red]YOU ARE WEAK!![/red][/jitter]
HUMILIATION HAS BEEN ADMINISTERED!”

The dummy is silent for a moment and—

“Choose a lower setting next time. Have a nice day.”

description.zhs:
[b]“[jitter]你通过了训练！[/jitter]
你现在已具备了守护这座[gold]工厂[/gold]，抵御入侵者的能力！！训练结束后，请务必记得补充水分！”[/b]
description.eng:
“[jitter]YOU PASS THE TRAINING![/jitter]
YOU ARE NOW EQUIPPED TO DEFEND THIS [gold]FACTORY[/gold] AGAINST INTRUDERS!! BE SURE TO HYDRATE AFTER TRAINING SESSIONS!”

description.zhs:
一座孤冢上[jitter][aqua]翻腾着汹涌的蓝焰[/aqua][/jitter]…

一名高傲的战士战死于此，灵魂却躁动不安。但它渴望继续战斗，你甚至能感觉到它在[sine]哀求[/sine]你带着它一起踏上征途。

但也许，让它直面[red]真相[/red]才是更好的选择？
description.eng:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

description.zhs: 获得[gold]{Relic}[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain [gold]{Relic}[/gold].

description.zhs: 将一张[red]{Curse}[/red]到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。 为一张带有[gold]消耗[/gold]的牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]。
description.eng: Add [red]{Curse}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].

description.zhs: 你没有可被[purple]附魔[/purple]的带有[gold]消耗[/gold]的卡牌。
description.eng: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

description.zhs:
你将手搭在墓碑上，低声呢喃…

[sine]“随我一同攀升吧…”[/sine]

作为回应，蓝焰从墓中涌出，聚成一团[aqua]燃烧之魂[/aqua]，忠诚地萦绕在你身边。
它认出了你的本质，并愿护送你前往旅途的终点。
description.eng:
You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

[sine]“Ascend with me...”[/sine]

In response, the flames draw out from the grave and coalesce into a [aqua]burning soul[/aqua] and hover around you loyally.
It knows what you are, and wishes to escort you to your final destination.

description.zhs:
你将手搭在墓碑上，低声呢喃…

[sine]“你已经可以不用再战斗了…”[/sine]

作为回应，那灵魂猛然撞入你的意志，一场[jitter][aqua]灵魂之战[/aqua][/jitter]就此爆发！
它被你经历过的无数次血战所震慑，最终选择了认输。
description.eng:
You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

[sine]“Your fight is over...”[/sine]

In response, the soul crashes into yours and a [jitter][aqua]SOUL FIGHT[/aqua][/jitter] ensues!
Stunned by the countless battles you have endured, it concedes.

description.zhs:
[sine]上一次吃饭是什么时候来着？
…等等，这股奇妙的香味是怎么回事？[/sine]

循着气味，你来到了一处温馨的营地，各种[green]美味的蘑菇[/green]正在火上烤着！由于实在是太饿了，你甚至完全没想过这些玩意儿安不安全。
（你饿得甚至连旁边有个死掉的冒险者这事都没注意到）
description.eng:
[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

description.zhs:
你咬下一口那颗[orange]大蘑菇[/orange]。这蘑菇肉质紧实，口感粉糯，让人十分满足。可你越吃就越觉得饿，仿佛这蘑菇正在以你的饥饿为食。

[sine]太香了…你陷入了[red]饭后昏迷[/red]。[/sine]
你将为这份贪吃，付出代价。
description.eng:
You bite into the [orange]Big Mushroom[/orange]. Its flesh is firm, starchy, and satisfying. The more you eat, the hungrier you become, as if the mushroom is feeding on your hunger.

[sine]So yummy... you enter a [red]food coma[/red].[/sine]
This gluttony will cost you.

description.zhs:
你试吃了一口那颗[green]闻着更香的[/green]，这种木质小蘑菇散发着一种微妙的贝类香气……

一股能量猛然爆发，驱使你奔跑、跳跃，甚至还够你[gold]进行一场特训[/gold]！
紧接着，一阵突如其来的[red][jitter]剧烈刺痛[/jitter][/red]席卷而来，那是尚且存活的真菌在你体内挣扎着，走完它最后的短暂时刻。
description.eng:
You sample the [green]Fragrant One[/green], a small woody mushroom with a delicate scent of shellfish...

A burst of energy spurs you to run, jump, and [gold]rigorously train[/gold]!
Then, a sudden [red][jitter]stabbing pain[/jitter][/red] hits you as the living fungi struggles within you during its brief final moments.

description.zhs:
那份[green]蘑菇拼盘[/green]看上去最诱人，于是你直接下了手。

[red][jitter][b]“我的蘑菇！！”[/b][/jitter][/red]

那个本以为已经死透了的冒险者居然跳起来攻击你！你顺手把它放倒。最终，在一抹负罪感调味下，你干掉了剩下的美食。
description.eng:
The [green]medley of mushrooms[/green] looks the most appetizing so you go for that.

[red][jitter]“MY MUSHROOMS!!”[/jitter][/red]

The adventurer, presumably dead, attacks you! You knock them out, and with a seasoning of guilt, finish the rest of the fine meal.

display_name.zhs: 镜中倒影  影倒中镜

title.zhs: 镜中倒影  影倒中镜

description.zhs:
这是什么？这里感觉不太对劲….
[sine]….劲对太不觉感里这？么什是这[/sine]
description.eng:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
[sine]...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW[/sine]

description.zhs: 复制你的整个[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[purple]霉运[/purple]。
description.eng: Duplicate your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Receive [purple]Bad Luck[/purple].

description.zhs: [red]降级[/red][blue]2[/blue]张随机卡牌。[green]升级[/green][blue]4[/blue]张随机卡牌。
description.eng: [red]Downgrade[/red] [blue]2[/blue] random cards. [green]Upgrade[/green] [blue]4[/blue] random cards.

description.zhs:
你集中精神，终于辨识出前方有一面巨大且没有丝毫缝隙的镜子。
你飞出一脚，把巨大镜子[jitter]踢碎[/jitter]了！
就在踢碎镜子的那个瞬间，你看到镜中的自己摆出了防御的姿态，然后碎成了千万片美丽闪烁着的碎片。

这样的地方究竟是如何存在的？
description.eng:
You concentrate and identify a giant seamless mirror in front of you.
With a swift kick you [jitter]SHATTER[/jitter] the giant mirror!
Right as you shatter the mirror your reflection braces {pronounObject}self as {pronounSubject} becomes a thousand beautiful glittering shards.

How can a place like this exist?

description.zhs:
你向前伸手，手却与前方倒映出来的影像融在了一起。
[sine]哪一个才是我？[/sine]
description.eng:
You reach forth and meld into the reflection in front of you.
[sine]Which one am I?[/sine]

description.zhs:
你找到了一份送给[blue]“加拉洛特爵士”的[/blue][orange]请柬[/orange]，邀请他参加一次茶会，于是你决定代他前去。

走进其貌不扬的圆形大厅时，你发现这里有一大群[gold]指挥官[/gold]、[aqua]将军[/aqua]、[red]军阀[/red]和[blue]商人[/blue]们，正在……喝着茶？
一个头戴[gold]金冠[/gold]的巨人骑士开口说道：

[jitter]“汝来[b]茶会[/b]竟敢迟到？！”[/jitter]
description.eng:
You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]“Sir Galalot”[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of [gold]commanders[/gold], [aqua]generals[/aqua], [red]warlords[/red], and [blue]mercenaries[/blue] having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a [gold]golden crown[/gold] speaks.

[jitter]“Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!”[/jitter]

description.zhs: 获得[red]{Relic}[/red]。[green]回复全部生命。[/green]
description.eng: Obtain [red]{Relic}[/red]. [green]Heal to full HP.[/green]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{Damage}[/red]点生命。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{Damage}[/red] HP. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

description.zhs:
众人震惊地望着一位常客的尸体……然后居然[jitter]响起了如雷的掌声！？[/jitter]

“我们早就头疼该怎么处理掉[red]外高尔爵士[/red]了，你干得好啊！”

他们倒掉了你的[green]毒茶[/green]，你们整晚讨论着[orange]战术[/orange]与[purple]秘密[/purple]。真是次开心的茶会啊。
description.eng:
The patrons stare wide-eyed at the corpse of one of their regulars... then [jitter]bursts into applause!?[/jitter]

“We were wondering how to rid of [red]Sir Wygore[/red], incredible work!”

They dump out your [green]poisoned tea[/green] and you discuss [orange]tactics[/orange] and [purple]secrets[/purple] all night. A most excellent tea party.

description.zhs:
你抓起一个茶杯，一口喝了下去。
茶水[jitter][red]像开水一样滚烫[/red][/jitter]但你忍着没有改变表情，众人都被你如此不顾自身安危的行为给震惊了。

“之前的话，我们绝无意冒犯，[blue]加拉洛特爵士[/blue]。请接受我们最诚挚的道歉。”

你享用了一些茶水和烤面饼，完全没有注意到自己已经喝下了[green]毒药[/green]。
description.eng:
You grab a teacup and down it one go.
It's [jitter][red]SCALDING HOT[/red][/jitter] but you don't change your expression. The patrons are stunned by your lack of self preservation.

“We meant no offense, [blue]Sir Galalot[/blue]. our sincerest apologies.”

You enjoy some tea and crumpets, unaware of the [green]poison[/green] you've ingested.

description.zhs:
他们全都将武器指向了你——

“要是想活命，至少也得付下[gold]入场费[/gold]吧。”
description.eng:
They all point their weapons at you-

“At least pay the [gold]entrance fee[/gold] if you want to live.”

description.zhs:
你跳到桌上，一脚[jitter]踹上[/jitter]了[red]军阀骑士[/red]的面门！
骑士令人毛骨悚然地惨叫了一声，就这么倒了下去。

[jitter][purple]*所有人都倒吸了一口凉气*[/purple][/jitter]
description.eng:
You jump onto the table and [jitter]kick[/jitter] the [red]warlord knight[/red] in the face!
 The knight lets out a haunting shriek and keels over.

[jitter][purple]*everyone gasps*[/purple][/jitter]

description.zhs:
你排起队，和众人一起进入一栋巨大的建筑物。

当你通过一道[gold]金色的拱门[/gold]时，突然号角响起、[jitter]彩纸爆裂飞散[/jitter]、天花板上还飞出了众多[sine]彩条[/sine]！

“[blue]{EntrantNumber}[/blue]号进入者，你将成为今天[gold]审判[/gold]的[green]判决者[/green]。”
description.eng:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

“Entrant [blue]{EntrantNumber}[/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold].”

description.zhs: 担当今天的判决者
description.eng: Serve as today's Decider.

transition_note.eng: Accepting randomly selects MERCHANT, NOBLE, or NONDESCRIPT; no single next_page represents this branch.

description.zhs: [red]拒绝是不被允许的。[/red]
description.eng: [red]You are not allowed to Reject.[/red]

transition_note.eng: Moves to REJECT, offering Accept again or Double Down.

description.zhs: 一个[green]看起来很有钱的商人[/green]诉说了自己的案件：他被一个对手指控[red]谋杀[/red]。证据相当稀少，你感觉他很可能是无辜的，但是周围的看客们似乎都想要见到鲜血。
description.eng: A [green]wealthy-looking merchant[/green], presents his case. He is accused of [red]murder[/red] by one of his rivals. The evidence is thin, and you have a feeling that the man is innocent, but the onlookers seem out for blood.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]悔恨[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Guilty result for MERCHANT; applies its reward/penalty and finishes.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]羞耻[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。[gold]升级[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: Add [red]Shame[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

transition_note.eng: Innocent result for MERCHANT; applies its reward/penalty and finishes.

description.zhs:
你判定这个人的所有财产都要被充公，作为今日法庭的审讯费用。
人群愉悦地高呼起来。
description.eng:
You rule that all of the man's possessions are to be taken and given as processing fees for the court.
The crowd howls in glee!

description.zhs:
你听从了自己的良知，宣判此人无罪。
尽管周围嘘声不断，还有人骂你是个[sine][purple]“被收买的法官”[/purple][/sine]，你依旧觉得自己做出了正确的选择。
description.eng:
You go with your conscience and rule that the man is innocent.
Despite the boos and accusations of being a [sine][purple]“paid-off judge”[/purple][/sine] you feel like you did the right thing.

description.zhs:
一个[gold]权势很大的贵族[/gold]走上前来。你发现自己的口袋里被塞了一张字条，说只要宣判他无罪就会得到巨额回报。[gold]贵族[/gold]对于[purple]贪污腐败的指控[/purple]几乎没有做任何反驳，只是特意向你露出一个得意的笑容。
你无法阻止贪污腐败，但你可以借此机会捞一些[gold]金币……[/gold]
description.eng:
A [gold]powerful noble[/gold] steps forward. You find a note in your pocket indicating that if you decide innocence you will be handsomely rewarded. The [gold]noble[/gold] barely argues against the [purple]corruption charges[/purple] and gives you a knowing smirk.
You can't stop corruption but you can pocket some [gold]gold...[/gold]

description.zhs: 回复[green]10[/green]点生命。
description.eng: Heal [green]10[/green] HP.

transition_note.eng: Guilty result for NOBLE; applies its reward/penalty and finishes.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]悔恨[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]300[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain [blue]300[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
