transition_note.eng: Innocent result for NOBLE; applies its reward/penalty and finishes.

description.zhs:
[gold]大贵族[/gold]被[red]斩首处死[/red]。
世界上又少了一个[purple]腐败的贵族[/purple]。
description.eng:
The [gold]powerful noble[/gold] was [red]beheaded[/red].
One less [purple]corrupt noble[/purple].

description.zhs:
你[sine][purple]其实[/purple][/sine]不是特别清楚他有没有罪……对，就是这样！
这笔[gold]贿赂[/gold]和判决的结果没有任何关系。完全没有。
description.eng:
You don't [sine][purple]really[/purple][/sine] know that he's guilty... Yeah, that's it!
The [gold]bribe[/gold] has nothing to do with the outcome here. Nope.

description.zhs:
一个[orange]表情难以阅读的平凡女子[/orange]走上前来。她被指控犯下了[red]盗窃[/red]与[purple]诈骗[/purple]的罪行。这名女子开口时，你觉得她非常可信。但是有众多证人都作证说她做出过许多坏事。
两边的说法都很有说服力！
description.eng:
A [orange]nondescript woman with a hard-to-read face[/orange] steps forward. She is charged with the crime of [red]theft[/red] and [purple]con-artistry[/purple]. When the woman speaks, you believe her, but ample witnesses attest to her misdeeds.
Both sides of the story are compelling!

description.zhs: 将一张[red]疑虑[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]次卡牌奖励。
description.eng: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain [blue]2[/blue] card rewards.

transition_note.eng: Guilty result for NONDESCRIPT; applies its reward/penalty and finishes.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]疑虑[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards.

transition_note.eng: Innocent result for NONDESCRIPT; applies its reward/penalty and finishes.

description.zhs:
你并不是很确定真相如何，但艰难的决定总要有人做出，你觉得证据已经算是足够。
你是否真的做出了正确的判决呢？
description.eng:
You aren't totally sure, but making the hard choice, you think the evidence is adequate.
Did you really make the right call?

description.zhs:
你并不是很确定真相如何，但你有着合理的怀疑。
你不知道自己的判决是否正确，只是觉得无罪应该是更好的选择。
description.eng:
You aren't totally sure, but you have a reasonable doubt.
You don't know if you made the right call, but innocence seems like the better choice.

description.zhs:
[jitter]“[b]你不能拒绝！！[/b]”[/jitter]

[gold]法院总仲裁官[/gold]大声喊道。

[jitter]“回绝此项特权者，将被判处[red][b]死刑[/b][/red]。你是否还要抗命！？”[/jitter]
description.eng:
[jitter]“YOU CANNOT REFUSE!!”[/jitter]

Shouts the [gold]Grand Arbiter of the Courts[/gold].

[jitter]“Those who reject this privilege are penalized with [red]DEATH[/red]. Do you still defy!?”[/jitter]

description.zhs: 放弃。担当今天的判决者。
description.eng: Give in. Serve as today's Decider.

transition_note.eng: Accepting from REJECT calls the same Accept flow, randomly selecting MERCHANT/NOBLE/NONDESCRIPT.

description.zhs: [red]直面致命的后果。[/red]
description.eng: [red]Face lethal repercussions.[/red]

transition_note.eng: Opens the abandon/death confirmation popup and is marked as killing the player; this is not a normal event page transition.

warnings: TRIAL ACCEPT transition is dynamic: RNG selects MERCHANT/NOBLE/NONDESCRIPT
TRIAL DOUBLE_DOWN opens abandon confirmation popup; not a normal event page transition
TRIAL REJECT/ACCEPT transition is dynamic: RNG selects MERCHANT/NOBLE/NONDESCRIPT

description.zhs:
你在翻越[red][sine]数不尽的尸山血海[/sine][/red]之时，遇到了一位正在搜寻破烂的[orange]疯狂科学家[/orange]。

“是的，嗨，你好！你看起来是个有实力的战士……我的下一件[green]暴行装备[/green]正需要一个测试员！你觉得怎么样？”
description.eng:
Navigating through an [red][sine]endless sea of corpses[/sine][/red], you find a [orange]mad scientist[/orange] scavenging for various scraps.

“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?”

description.zhs: 制作一张定制卡牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Create a custom card to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Moves to CHOOSE_CARD_TYPE; the Attack/Skill/Power options are randomly reduced to 2 visible choices.

description.zhs: “你觉得什么样的工具能帮助你[red][jitter]杀死所有人[/jitter][/red]？”
description.eng: “What kind of tool will help you [red][jitter]kill everyone[/jitter][/red]?”

description.zhs: 制作一张攻击牌。
description.eng: Make an Attack.

transition_note.eng: Stores the chosen card type and moves to CHOOSE_RIDER; that page randomly shows 2 rider options from the matching pool.

description.zhs: 制作一张能力牌。
description.eng: Make a Power.

transition_note.eng: Stores the chosen card type and moves to CHOOSE_RIDER; that page randomly shows 2 rider options from the matching pool.

description.zhs: 制作一张技能牌。
description.eng: Make a Skill.

transition_note.eng: Stores the chosen card type and moves to CHOOSE_RIDER; that page randomly shows 2 rider options from the matching pool.

description.zhs:
“很棒的选择！那么，它应该发挥什么[sine]作用[/sine]呢？”
[orange]科学家[/orange]开心地搓起了她的双手。
description.eng:
“Excellent choice! Now what should it [sine]DO[/sine]?”
The [orange]scientist[/orange] rubs her hands together with glee.

description.zhs: 将一张随机牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。
description.eng: Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 本回合，你每打出一张牌，该敌人失去[blue]{ChokingDamage}[/blue]点生命。
description.eng: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses [blue]{ChokingDamage}[/blue] HP.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 能力牌的耗能减少[blue]{CuriousReduction}[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
description.eng: Powers cost [blue]{CuriousReduction}[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 获得{EnergizedEnergy:energyIcons()}。
description.eng: Gain {EnergizedEnergy:energyIcons()}.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{ExpertiseStrength}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。获得[blue]{ExpertiseDexterity}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
description.eng: Gain [blue]{ExpertiseStrength}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. Gain [blue]{ExpertiseDexterity}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 在战斗结束时，随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。
description.eng: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 给予[blue]{SappingWeak}[/blue]层[gold]虚弱[/gold]。给予[blue]{SappingVulnerable}[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
description.eng: Apply [blue]{SappingWeak}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold]. Apply [blue]{SappingVulnerable}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 额外命中[blue]2[/blue]次。
description.eng: Hits [blue]2[/blue] additional times.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 抽[blue]{WisdomCards}[/blue]张牌。
description.eng: Draw [blue]{WisdomCards}[/blue] cards.

transition_note.eng: Choosing this rider adds the corresponding customized MadScience to the deck and finishes on DONE.

description.zhs:
“呼——！大功告成啦，这个送给你！现在出去好好[red][jitter]杀个痛快[/jitter][/red]吧！！”

你不知道的是，这位[orange]科学家[/orange]后来创造出了几百件武器，导致了高塔之中数以千计的死亡。
description.eng:
“Whew! All done. This is for you! Now get out there and [red][jitter]slaughter[/jitter][/red]!!”

Little did you know, that [orange]scientist[/orange] went on to create hundreds of weapons, resulting in several thousand deaths within the Spire.

description.zhs:
[jitter]咚！[/jitter]

你的头顶传来一阵刺痛，一个念头刺入了你的脑海。

[purple][sine][b]“分享知识吗？？？”[/b][/sine][/purple]

你不知如何是好…
description.eng:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...

description.zhs: 失去[red]{RipHpLoss}[/red]点生命值。获得一次无色卡牌奖励。
description.eng: Lose [red]{RipHpLoss}[/red] HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

description.zhs: 从[blue]{FromCardChoiceCount}[/blue]张随机牌中选择[blue]{CardChoiceCount}[/blue]张加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Choose [blue]{CardChoiceCount}[/blue] of [blue]{FromCardChoiceCount}[/blue] random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs:
你暴力地将[jitter]它从头上扯了下来[/jitter]，并狠狠地把它丢得远远的！

你的脑海中响起一个声音：
[purple][sine]“不~~~~~~~~~~~~…”
description.eng:
You violently [jitter]rip the leech off your head[/jitter] and chuck it far far away!

There's a voice in your head:
[purple][sine]“NOOOOOOoOoooooOOOOoooo....”

description.zhs:
[purple][sine][b]“何其浮华博大，迷宫般的头脑！
这简直是取之不尽的智识珍馐，当真让人大快朵颐啊！”[/b][/sine][/purple]

脑蛭心满意足地弹开了，随后爬向远方。
你[blue]大受震撼[/blue]。
description.eng:
[purple][sine]“HOW OSTENTATIOUSLY SCHOLASTIC OF A LABYRINTHINE MIND!
A VERITABLE CORNUCOPIA OF CEREBRAL SUSTENANCE TO DIGEST!”[/sine][/purple].

Satisfied, the creature pops off and crawls away.
You are [blue]flabbergasted[/blue].

description.zhs:
[sine][blue]“我预见到了你的到来…！”[/blue][/sine]

当你走进一间[purple]神秘小屋[/purple]时，一个[jitter]沙哑[/jitter]的声音传了过来。

[sine][blue]“你的命运指引你来到此处。我们必须揭开你的未来与运势，这样你才能拯救我们所有人！！”[/blue][/sine]
“好啦，这是进行[gold]水晶球占卜[/gold]的几个选项。另外，记得把这份免责协议也签了，”她一边说着，一边拿出了笔和羊皮纸。
description.eng:
[sine][blue]“I predicted you'd enter...!”[/blue][/sine]

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”[/blue][/sine]
“Okay, here are the options for the [gold]Crystal Sphere reading[/gold]. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.

description.zhs: 获得一张[red]{CurseTitle}[/red]。[purple]占卜[/purple][blue]{PaymentPlanCount}[/blue]次。
description.eng: Gain a [red]{CurseTitle}[/red]. [purple]Divine[/purple] [blue]{PaymentPlanCount}[/blue] times.

description.zhs: 支付[red]{UncoverFutureCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[purple]占卜[/purple][blue]{UncoverFutureProphesizeCount}[/blue]次。
description.eng: Pay [red]{UncoverFutureCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [purple]Divine[/purple] [blue]{UncoverFutureProphesizeCount}[/blue] times.

description.zhs: 我已考虑妥当
description.eng: I'm done pondering

description.zhs: 分期付款
description.eng: Payment Plan

description.zhs: 揭幕未来
description.eng: Uncover Future

description.zhs:
你走进了一间隐藏的密室……

这里堆满了琳琅满目的玩偶。每一只都独一无二，它们的表情亦从[green]喜悦[/green]到[purple]悲哀[/purple]各不相同，其服饰跨越了数个世纪，甚至来自你认知之外的领域。

一阵[sine][blue]低语的合唱[/blue][/sine]变得越来越响，直到[jitter][red]那些玩偶互相争吵着大叫起来[/red][/jitter]，放声呼唤着你……

你必须选择一个，并立刻离开这个地方。
description.eng:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

label.zhs: 仔细检查然后挑选最好的那个
label.eng: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice

description.zhs: 失去[red]{ExamineHpLoss}[/red]点生命。从[blue]3[/blue]尊[gold]玩偶遗物[/gold]中选择[blue]1[/blue]尊带走。
description.eng: Lose [red]{ExamineHpLoss}[/red] HP. Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Doll Relics[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Loses HP and shows all doll choices on EXAMINE.

description.zhs: 获取一尊[gold]玩偶遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain a random [gold]Doll Relic[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Randomly chooses one doll/relic, obtains it, and finishes with that doll descriptionKey; the result text depends on the random choice.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{TakeTimeHpLoss}[/red]点生命。从[blue]2[/blue]尊[gold]玩偶遗物[/gold]中选择[blue]1[/blue]尊带走。
description.eng: Lose [red]{TakeTimeHpLoss}[/red] HP. Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Doll Relics[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Loses HP and shows 2 randomly sampled doll choices on TAKE_SOME_TIME.

description.zhs:
[blue]“能被我选中，你应当感到庆幸！”[/blue]
这尊玩偶洋洋得意地宣告道。
description.eng:
[blue]“You should be happy I chose you!”[/blue]
The doll proclaims triumphantly.

description.zhs:
在做出决定之前，你仔细审视了这里的每一尊玩偶。

那些大叫声已变成了[red][jitter]刺耳的强音[/jitter][/red]，但你还是在彻底陷入疯狂之前，设法做出了选择！
description.eng:
You examine each and every doll before you make your choice.

The shouting has reached a [red][jitter]piercing crescendo[/jitter][/red] but you manage to make a choice before going completely mad!

description.zhs:
一个温暖的声音欢快地充盈在你的脑海中。
[orange][sine]“我们要一起去发掘那些最为动人的故事！”[/sine][/orange]
description.eng:
A warm voice happily fills your head.
[orange][sine]“We are going to uncover the most delightful stories together!”[/sine][/orange]

description.zhs:
当你拾起那尊[sine][purple]破损不堪的玩偶[/purple][/sine]时，所有的喧嚣都戛然而止。
这一尊，始终缄默。
description.eng:
As you pick up the [sine][purple]worn-looking doll[/purple][/sine], all of the voices go silent.
This one doesn't speak.

description.zhs: 获得[gold]{RelicName}[/gold]。
description.eng: Receive [gold]{RelicName}[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Generic text for dynamically generated doll choices; choosing a specific doll obtains its relic and finishes with that doll description.

description.zhs:
喧嚣之中，你飞快地审视着这些玩偶。

这两尊里，或许有一尊是不错的选择？
但在[red]精神的摧残[/red]下，你实在难以集中神志。
description.eng:
Amid the shouting, you quickly examine the dolls.

One of these two may be good?
It's hard to concentrate through the [red]mental anguish[/red].

warnings: DOLL_ROOM RANDOM transition is dynamic: random doll descriptionKey determines finish text

description.zhs: 占位符
description.eng: Placeholder

description.zhs:
空气中传来一阵[sine]浓浓的酸味[/sine]，不一会儿你在附近找到了一个倒在地上的[gold]药水快递员[/gold]。
一动不动，已经没了气。[jitter]死了！？[/jitter]
快递员带着的物品已经被洗劫得差不多了，只有一批[green][sine]很难闻的药水[/sine][/green]好好地放在那里，上面有一张字条：“收件人：商人”。
description.eng:
There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".

description.zhs: 获得[blue]{FoulPotions}[/blue]瓶[gold]污浊药水[/gold]。
description.eng: Procure [blue]{FoulPotions}[/blue] [gold]Foul {FoulPotions:plural:Potion|Potions}[/gold].

description.zhs: 获得[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机[gold]罕见药水[/gold]。
description.eng: Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Uncommon Potion[/gold].

description.zhs: [blue]商人[/blue]要这些药水究竟是为了什么呢？
description.eng: What could the [blue]Merchant[/blue] want with these potions?

description.zhs: 只有一瓶药水还完好无损。
description.eng: Only a single potion was intact.

description.zhs:
一个[purple]你至今为止见过最年迈的人[/purple]走到了你的身前。
[sine]“我们又见面了....是我，兰伟德！”[/sine]

你不认识这个男人。
description.eng:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.

description.zhs: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

description.zhs: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

description.zhs: 你没有任何可以给他的药水。
description.eng: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

description.zhs: 获得[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

description.zhs: 你没有任何可以给他的遗物。
description.eng: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

description.zhs:
[sine]“何等..美妙…”[/sine]

兰伟德一边嚼着[gold]金币[/gold]，一边咕哝着。
description.eng:
[sine]“Mag.. nificent...”[/sine]

Ranwid mumbles while chewing the [gold]gold[/gold].

description.zhs:
“[sine]多么美味…”[/sine]

[sine][blue]咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟[/blue][/sine]

他一口气就喝下了[gold]{Potion}[/gold]。
description.eng:
“[sine]Exquisite...”[/sine]

[sine][blue]Glup glup glup[/blue][/sine]

He downs the [gold]{Potion}[/gold] in one go.

description.zhs:
[sine]“真是经典…”[/sine]

兰伟德仔细地观察了这件遗物好几分钟……

然后把[gold]{Relic}[/gold]吃了下去。
description.eng:
[sine]“Exemplary...”[/sine]

Ranwid observes the relic studiously for several minutes...

Then eats the [gold]{Relic}[/gold].

description.zhs:
你走过一个拐角，一个黑影突然矗立在前方。他转过身来，正对着你。

“欢迎！你想换点什么吶？”
他开口询问，同时猛地掀开斗篷，露出一大堆[sine][purple]可疑货物[/purple][/sine]。
description.eng:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

“Welcome! What're ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of [sine][purple]suspicious wares[/purple][/sine].

description.zhs: 用[gold]{BottomRelicOwned}[/gold]换[gold]{BottomRelicNew}[/gold]。
description.eng: Trade [gold]{BottomRelicOwned}[/gold] for [gold]{BottomRelicNew}[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Trades slot 3: removes the owned relic, obtains the paired new relic, then shows DONE finish text.

description.zhs: 用[gold]{MiddleRelicOwned}[/gold]换[gold]{MiddleRelicNew}[/gold]。
description.eng: Trade [gold]{MiddleRelicOwned}[/gold] for [gold]{MiddleRelicNew}[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Trades slot 2: removes the owned relic, obtains the paired new relic, then shows DONE finish text.

description.zhs: 用[gold]{TopRelicOwned}[/gold]换[gold]{TopRelicNew}[/gold]。
description.eng: Trade [gold]{TopRelicOwned}[/gold] for [gold]{TopRelicNew}[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Trades slot 1: removes the owned relic, obtains the paired new relic, then shows DONE finish text.

description.zhs: “嘿嘿嘿……多谢啦！”
description.eng: “Hehehe Heh... Thank you!”

description.zhs:
这房间里全是[b][jitter]芝士！！！[/jitter][/b]

你环顾四周，想看看有没有陷阱，结果发现头顶上是…更多的[b]芝士[/b]。屋里的蜡烛似乎也是用[b]芝士[/b]做的。家具同样是[b]芝士[/b]。
突然，你身后的门砰地一声关上了。

也是[b]芝士[/b]做的。
description.eng:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].

description.zhs: 从[blue]8[/blue]张随机[gold]普通[/gold]牌中选择[blue]2[/blue]张加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
description.eng: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[red]{Damage}[/red]点生命，获得[gold]天选芝士[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{Damage}[/red] HP. Obtain the [gold]Chosen Cheese[/gold].

description.zhs:
你小尝了一小口[b]芝士[/b]，但这反而勾起了你对[b]芝士[/b]更强烈的食欲。

[sine]时光流逝…[/sine]

你最终吃下了惊人份量的[b]芝士[/b]。
今晚，大概梦里都全是[b]芝士[/b]了。
description.eng:
You take a little nibble of [b]cheese[/b] but this fuels you to eat even more [b]cheese[/b].

[sine]Time passes...[/sine]

 You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of [b]cheese[/b].
Tonight, dreams will be [b]cheese[/b].

description.zhs:
你翻来覆去地找了[sine]几个小时……[/sine]

在这满屋[b]芝士[/b]的浓香包围下，你的意识开始飘向某些诡异的地方，时光悄然流逝，而你，渐渐陷入了昏沉…
你猛然惊醒，发现手中正攥着什么东西。

[b]那块天选芝士。[/b]
description.eng:
You scrounge about for [sine]hours and hours...[/sine]

Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this [b]cheese[/b], and you fade into a stupor....
You snap awake and realize you're holding something.

[b]The Chosen Cheese.[/b]

description.zhs:
地上有一本书：
《征服高塔的3种最佳方法》

这本书上[red]血迹斑斑[/red]，所以你觉得它非常可疑。

你要读它吗？
description.eng:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

description.zhs: 你没有任何可以附魔的牌。
description.eng: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.

description.zhs: 选择一张能力牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment3}[/purple][blue]{Enchantment3Amount}[/blue]。
description.eng: Choose a Power to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment3}[/purple] [blue]{Enchantment3Amount}[/blue].

description.zhs: 你没有任何可以[gold]附魔[/gold]的能力牌。
description.eng: You don't have any Powers that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

description.zhs: 选择一张技能牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment2}[/purple][blue]{Enchantment2Amount}[/blue]。
description.eng: Choose a Skill to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment2}[/purple] [blue]{Enchantment2Amount}[/blue].

description.zhs: 你没有任何可以[gold]附魔[/gold]的技能牌。
description.eng: You don't have any Skills that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

description.zhs: 选择一张攻击牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment1}[/purple][blue]{Enchantment1Amount}[/blue]。
description.eng: Choose an Attack to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment1}[/purple] [blue]{Enchantment1Amount}[/blue].

description.zhs: 你没有任何可以[gold]附魔[/gold]的攻击牌。
description.eng: You don't have any Attacks that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].

description.zhs: 你本来就不怎么喜欢书籍，更何况是上面血迹斑斑的那种。
description.eng: You don't particularly care for books, let alone blood-encrusted ones.

description.zhs:
真是本引人入胜的书啊！有几句良言至今深刻在你的脑海之中：
“避战大怪。”
“见牌就抓。”
“懦夫才防。”

你的手上沾满了[red]血[/red]。
description.eng:
What an engrossing read! Some choice quotes remain fresh in your mind:
“Avoid big monsters.”
“Take every card.”
“Blocking is for cowards.”

Your hands are covered in [red]blood[/red].

description.zhs:
你随便翻到一页：
“防御入门：别被打中！”

你读完了这一段，意外地相当给你启发。你决定在作战时用上其中的一些要点。
description.eng:
You flip to a random page:
“Defense 101: Don't get hit!”

You read the rest of the passage and it's surprisingly illuminating. You incorporate these ideas into your battle tactics.

description.zhs:
你将书反过来，读了封底上的摘要：
[blue]“书评家和邪教徒们一致认同，尖尖的锋利武器是施加伤害的最佳途径！”[/blue]

封底还有一张售价标签，原价格被划掉了，改成了一个低得多的价格。
description.eng:
You flip the book over and read the summary:
[blue]“Critics and Cultists agree that sharp and pointy weapons are the best way to inflict damage!”[/blue]

There's a price sticker on the back of the book, crossed out and marked with a greatly reduced price.

description.zhs: 当你穿过一座摇摇欲坠的木桥时，忽然间[blue][jitter]暴雨倾盆[/jitter][/blue]。[purple][sine]阵阵狂风[/sine][/purple]不断向你袭来，似乎要将你的旅程终结于此。
description.eng: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden [blue][jitter]torrent of rain[/jitter][/blue]. [purple][sine]Massive gusts of wind[/sine][/purple] buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: [red]{RandomCard}[/red]将从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中被移除。
description.eng: [red]{RandomCard}[/red] is removed from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Removes the currently selected random card and finishes the event.

description.zhs: [jitter]你正在坚持！[/jitter]
description.eng: [jitter]You're holding on![/jitter]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: 还在…坚…[jitter]扌~~寺！！！[/jitter]
description.eng: Still... Holding... [jitter]ooOOONN!!!![/jitter]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: [sine]口~阝~可~！？！！！[/sine]
description.eng: [sine]AHHHH!?!!![/sine]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: [jitter][b]我能行！！！[/b][/jitter]
description.eng: [jitter][b]I CAN DO THIS!!![/b][/jitter]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: [gold][b][jitter][b]不～～～～[/b][/jitter][/b][/gold]
description.eng: [gold][b][jitter][b]NOOOOOooo[/b][/jitter][/b][/gold]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: [red][b][jitter][b]我在干什么！？[/b][/jitter][/b][/red]
description.eng: [red][b][jitter][b]WHAT AM I DOING!?[/b][/jitter][/b][/red]

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: 开发者在此告知：对于坚持了这么久的玩家，这里已经没有额外的文本内容了。若有不便，我们对此深表歉意。
description.eng: The developer would like to inform you that there is no additional text for players who have held on this long. We apologize for the inconvenience.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

transition_note.eng: Loses HP, rerolls the removable card shown above, and advances to the next Hold On page; after the 7th hold it loops to HOLD_ON_LOOP.

description.zhs: 我恨桥。
description.eng: I hate bridges.

description.zhs:
在一个废弃庭院的当中，有一块巨大的石头。

石头边的一块牌子上写着：
[gold][b]永恒之石[/b][/gold]。

从它的样子、形状和装饰来看，整个庭院都是围绕着这块[blue]石头[/blue]建造出来的，它从来没有离开过那个地点哪怕一次。
description.eng:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{DrinkRandomPotion}[/red]。获得[blue]{DrinkMaxHpGain}[/blue]最大生命。
description.eng: Lose [red]{DrinkRandomPotion}[/red]. Gain [blue]{DrinkMaxHpGain}[/blue] Max HP.

description.zhs: 需要药水。
description.eng: Requires a Potion.

description.zhs: 失去[red]{PushHpLoss}[/red]点生命。[gold]附魔[/gold]一张攻击牌：[purple]活力[/purple][blue]{PushVigorousAmount}[/blue]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{PushHpLoss}[/red] HP. [gold]Enchant[/gold] an Attack with [purple]Vigorous[/purple] [blue]{PushVigorousAmount}[/blue].

description.zhs: 需要一张攻击牌。
description.eng: Requires an Attack.

description.zhs:
你一口闷了[gold]{DrinkRandomPotion}[/gold]，然后[jitter]用全身的力气试图抬起那块石头[/jitter]！！

什么也没发生。
description.eng:
You slam the [gold]{DrinkRandomPotion}[/gold] down and [jitter]lift with all your might[/jitter]!!

Nothing happens.

description.zhs:
你用尽全身的力气[jitter]努力地推了又推[/jitter]！！

什么也没发生。
description.eng:
You [jitter]push and push[/jitter] with everything you've got!!

Nothing happens.

description.zhs:
在你的旅程中，你遇到了一个黑色无定形的肉块状生物，你能感觉到它非常古老、并且非常邪恶。

[sine]过来吧…[/sine]
description.eng:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

description.zhs: 将一张攻击牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]。
description.eng: [gold]Enchant[/gold] an Attack with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].

description.zhs: 你没有可以附魔的攻击牌。
description.eng: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

description.zhs: 选择一张牌[gold]变化[/gold]。
description.eng: Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].

description.zhs:
它突然跳到了你的手臂上，这一瞬间，你感觉到灼烧般的疼痛，但很快它就消失不见了。

……？它到哪里去了？
description.eng:
It suddenly jumps onto you. You feel a searing pain as it latches onto your arm, but in an instant it is gone.

...? Where did it go?

description.zhs:
你将那黑色生物点燃，它发出尖锐的鸣叫、很快烧成了灰烬。你的脑袋砰砰作响、疼痛难忍，但你最终坚持着没有晕过去。
那究竟是什么东西？
description.eng:
You torch the dark polyp. As it screeches and burns into ashes, your head pulses painfully but you manage not to faint.
What was that thing?

description.zhs:
你不知怎么晃进了一个灯光昏暗的小棚屋，发现里面的空间感觉非常和平，四周摆满了种类繁多的茶叶。

屋子里面的男人做出手势，让你去看一批[green]茶叶[/green]，每一种都有雅致的标签告知你茶叶的[gold]高昂价格[/gold]。
description.eng:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

description.zhs: 支付[red]{BoneTeaCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。{BoneTeaDescription}
description.eng: Pay [red]{BoneTeaCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. {BoneTeaDescription}

description.zhs: 需要[blue]{BoneTeaCost}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Requires [blue]{BoneTeaCost}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs: 支付[red]{EmberTeaCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。{EmberTeaDescription}
description.eng: Pay [red]{EmberTeaCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. {EmberTeaDescription}

description.zhs: 需要[blue]{EmberTeaCost}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Requires [blue]{EmberTeaCost}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs: {TeaOfDiscourtesyDescription}
description.eng: {TeaOfDiscourtesyDescription}

description.zhs:
[blue]茶艺大师[/blue]认可了你的请求，开始了他的行动。

[gold]1.[/gold] 用勺子将一个装满木炭的玻璃瓶中的水舀到一个水壶里。
[gold]2.[/gold] 水壶用[purple]紫罗兰色的文火[/purple]慢慢熬煮。
[gold]3.[/gold] 在水开之前，往壶中放入一勺茶叶。
[gold]4.[/gold] 将壶从火源上拿下，用有节奏的敲击来计算时间。
[gold]5.[/gold] 将水壶高高举起，精准地将茶倒入下方极小的茶杯中。

[green][sine]“请用茶。”[/sine][/green]
description.eng:
The [blue]tea master[/blue] acknowledges your request and begins.

[gold]1.[/gold] Water from a charcoal-filled carafe is ladled into a kettle.
[gold]2.[/gold] The kettle is heated using a gentle [purple]violet flame[/purple].
[gold]3.[/gold] A scoop of tea goes into the kettle before it boils.
[gold]4.[/gold] Off the heat, and a series of rhythmic claps track the time.
[gold]5.[/gold] The kettle is hoisted high and precisely poured into a tiny cup.

[green][sine]“Tea is served.”[/sine][/green]

description.zhs:
你礼貌地拒绝了点茶，然后——

[jitter][red]*砰咚*[/red][/jitter]

你身后的门狠狠地关上了。[blue]茶艺大师[/blue]盯着你看了一会儿，然后拿出了一个很丑的杯子。
啊，这是专门给无礼之人准备的茶……
description.eng:
You politely decline the tea and—

[jitter][red]*SLAM*[/red][/jitter]

The door behind you slams shut. The [blue]tea master[/blue] stares at you for a moment, then presents an ugly cup.
Oh, this tea is for the discourteous...

description.zhs:
转过拐角，你感受到一阵轻微的轰鸣，随后发现了一台巨大的旋转装置！
它带有几个槽位，似乎能将液体转化为高度压缩的易消化药片。

将这些药水炼成一小片的想法令人有些不适，但或许尝试新事物也不错？
description.eng:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

description.zhs: 失去[gold]{Potion}[/gold]。获得一张[gold]升级过[/gold]的[gold]{Rarity}{Type}牌[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [gold]{Potion}[/gold]. Obtain an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] [gold]{Rarity} {Type}[/gold].

transition_note.eng: Generic dynamically titled option for each potion; discards that potion, offers upgraded cards of matching rarity and random type, then finishes on DONE.

description.zhs: 这药片真恶心。这未来简直毫无希望。
description.eng: The tablet was disgusting. There is no hope for the future.

description.zhs:
踏入漆黑的密室，一道亮光从上方刺破黑暗，与此同时，身后的门砰然关上。

借着光亮，你看到前方的石台上放着一张地图。你有一种强烈的想要拿走它的冲动。

事出反常。
description.eng:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.

description.zhs: 获得[gold]藏宝图[/gold]。
description.eng: Receive the [gold]Spoils Map[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[red]{Damage}[/red]点生命。获得[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机[gold]药水[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{Damage}[/red] HP. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

description.zhs: 再差能差到哪去？你抓起地图，一道出口随之就在房间对侧出现了。
description.eng: What's the worst that could happen? As you grab the map, an opening appears before you on the other side of the room.

description.zhs:
你在黑暗中摸索寻找出口，房间突然剧烈震动起来。伴随着一声巨响，整间密室在你周围轰然坍塌。

你艰难地从废墟中脱身，却意外发现了一瓶之前藏在房内的好东西。
description.eng:
As you sneak around the dark, looking for a way out the room starts to violently shake. With a sudden crash, the entire chamber collapses around you.

Barely making it out of the rubble, you find a vial of something useful that must have been hidden in the room.

description.zhs:
附近的一个坑洞里突然蹿出一双手臂，一只手紧握着一袋[gold]可疑的财宝[/gold]，另一只则拿着一件明显[purple]被诅咒的遗物[/purple]。

[jitter][blue]“这个……还是那个？”[/blue][/jitter]
一个嘶哑的声音从地下传来，向你低语。
description.eng:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a [gold]suspicious bag of riches[/gold] and a clearly [purple]cursed relic[/purple].

[jitter][blue]“This... or That?”[/blue][/jitter]
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

description.zhs: 将一张[red]{Curse}[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Add [red]{Curse}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[red]{HpLoss}[/red]点生命。获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP. Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

description.zhs:
你抓住了[purple]被诅咒的遗物[/purple]。刚握上去，你的手臂上就凭空出现了一对镣铐。

你听到一阵[blue][sine]幽灵般的笑声[/sine][/blue]，然后一道明亮的[orange]火光[/orange]充斥了你的视野！

坑洞和手臂都消失了。
description.eng:
You grab the [purple]Cursed Relic[/purple]. As soon as you grasp it, shackles materialize on your wrists.

You hear a [blue][sine]ghostly laughter[/sine][/blue] and a bright [orange]plume of fire[/orange] fills your vision!

The hole and arms are gone.

description.zhs:
你握住钱袋，瞬间有[blue][jitter]第[b]三[/b]只手[/jitter][/blue]冒了出来，想要抓住你！

你[red][jitter]拼命挣扎[/jitter][/red]了一番之后，它终于松开了手——坑洞和手臂全都消失了。
description.eng:
You grab the bag and as soon as you do, a [blue][jitter]THIRD hand[/jitter][/blue] appears and clutches at you!!

After a [red][jitter]frantic struggle[/jitter][/red], it releases—the arms and the hole have vanished.

description.zhs:
你看到一个学者被关在一个[purple]吊在空中的笼子[/purple]里，而旁边有一个[gold]大宝箱[/gold]。

那个学者一边咕哝着什么[sine][orange]“一次性的钥匙”[/orange][/sine]，一边拼命地在写着些什么。

看起来你可以二选一，要么打开[purple]笼子[/purple]，要么打开[gold]宝箱[/gold]。
description.eng:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]“One-Time-Use Keys”[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[gold]灯火钥匙[/gold]。获得[gold]历史课[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Obtain [gold]History Course[/gold].

description.zhs: 失去[gold]灯火钥匙[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]瓶随机[gold]药水[/gold]和[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
description.eng: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

description.zhs:
当你从口袋中拿出备用钥匙时，你听见[green]付袭[/green]如释重负地叹了一口气。

“你可真是吓坏我了。”
description.eng:
You hear [green]Repy[/green] let out a sigh of relief as you pull out the spare key from your pocket.

“You really had me going there”.

description.zhs: [green]付袭[/green]离开时，你用备用钥匙打开了宝箱。
description.eng: As [green]Repy[/green] walks away, you use your spare key to open the chest.

description.zhs:
你打开了笼子，[green]付袭[/green]向你鞠躬表达谢意。他递给你一本[gold]厚厚的硬皮书[/gold]。

“不懂得历史的人注定要重蹈覆辙。不过看起来你对‘重复’这件事还是略知一二的，对不对？”
description.eng:
[green]Repy[/green] bows in appreciation as you open the cage. He hands you a [gold]thick leather tome[/gold].

“Those who know not of history are doomed to repeat it. But you seem to know a thing or two about repeats don't you?”

description.zhs:
“选择不解放学者[green]付袭[/green]是吗？根据古典哲学理论，你该被称为是[red]道德败坏[/red]。没错，下次你最好想一想，是不是应该先考虑下被锁起来的[purple][jitter][b]活人[/b][/jitter][/purple]才对啊！你是觉得这里没有一位对社会有价值的成员正处于[purple][jitter][b]危难之中[/b][/jitter][/purple]吗！！”

“你看看这笼子有多小好不好！？唉我还在抱怨什么呢？你已经作出了你那缺乏学识的决定……嚯，看看那里面有什么？一些[gold]药水[/gold]和[gold]遗物[/gold]是吗？那可真好啊，[sine]真的好，对你来说真是太好了……[/sine]”

[green]付袭[/green]的眼睛鄙夷地盯着你从这里离开。
description.eng:
“Not going to free the scholar, [green]Repy[/green]? Based on classic philosophy, you would be considered a [red]moral failure[/red]. That's right, maybe consider the [purple][jitter]LIVING PERSON[/jitter][/purple] that is locked up next time! It is not as if there is a valuable member of society in a [purple][jitter]DIRE PREDICAMENT[/jitter][/purple] or anything!!”

“Look, okay, see how small this cage is!? Why am I complaining? You've already made your unscholarly decision... oh, what's inside there? Some [gold]potions[/gold] and [gold]relics[/gold]? Isn't that just great. [sine]Just great. Really great for you...[/sine]”

[green]Repy's[/green] eyes follow you with disdain as you walk away.

description.zhs:
“欢迎来到旺购百货，这里有超旺商品，一定让您越购越旺。”店员说着欢迎词，看起来没有丝毫热情。

“请随意查看我们的商品，祝您在旺购过得愉快。”店员头也不抬地继续说着。
description.eng:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.

description.zhs: 支付[red]{BargainBinCost}[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获得[blue]1[/blue]件随机[gold]普通遗物[/gold]。

description.zhs:
“旺购百货感谢您的慷慨旺旺采购……尊敬的贵客，您现在已经积攒了[blue]{WongoPointAmount}[/blue][gold]旺购积分[/gold]。只要再积[blue]{RemainingWongoPointAmount}[/blue]分，您就能获得我们专属的[gold]旺购客户感恩徽章[/gold]。祝您旺旺翻倍。”

你完全不知道这是在说什么，总之你发誓再也不会走进任何一家旺购百货。
description.eng:
“We are Wongo-wow'd by your generosity... Wonderful patron, you now have [blue]{WongoPointAmount}[/blue] [gold]Wongo Points[/gold]. With just [blue]{RemainingWongoPointAmount}[/blue] more points, you will receive our exclusive [gold]Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge[/gold]. Have a Wongtastic day.”

You have no clue what they are talking about and vow to never return to a Wongo's.

You have already received [blue]{TotalWongoBadgeAmount}[/blue] of these worthless badges. You vow to never return to a Wongo's.

店员递给你一个看起来做工很廉价的徽章：“祝您旺旺翻倍。”

The clerk hands you a cheaply made badge. “Have a Wongtastic day.”

You have now received [blue]{TotalWongoBadgeAmount}[/blue] {TotalWongoBadgeAmount:plural:badge|badges}. You vow to never return to a Wongo's.

description.zhs:
“嗯……抱歉，在旺购你不能不买东西就走的。”店员的语气听起来相当心烦。

你们两个就顾客有无选择权利的问题进行了[jitter][red]激烈[/red][/jitter]的辩论，让你[sine][purple]耗尽了精力[/purple][/sine]。
description.eng:
“Um... excuse me you can't just leave without buying something at Wongo's,” says the clerk with an irritated tone.

You have a [jitter][red]heated[/red][/jitter] debate over customer choice and it leaves you [sine][purple]mentally drained[/purple][/sine].
